It’s good that you are not afraid of hard work because the new responsibilities you have been asked to take on are going to be challenging. You must though pace yourself sensibly. If you just put your head down and charge you will very quickly exhaust yourself.

The tougher the challenge today the more you will like it, because it gives you a chance to prove yourself to people who have their doubts about your abilities. If you show the right combination of energy and intelligence they are sure to be impressed.

If a colleague or business partner says you need to sign up immediately to some kind of deal you would be wise to hold back and look at the situation in more detail. They may not be trying to trick you but they have certainly had better ideas.

The more you try to discuss your differences with someone in a reasonable manner the more irrational their words and actions are likely to get, so maybe the best approach would be to just keep quiet. Your silences can actually be quite intimidating.

While some people appear to believe that the best way to get what they want is to pound their rivals into submission you prefer a more subtle approach. If you keep what you say and do under strict control today there is no way you cannot win.

You like to keep busy and with Mars moving through the work area of your chart you won’t lack for opportunities to get things done. You must be selective though – don’t work for the sake of working. What is the most important task that requires your attention?

The changes that are now taking place may not appeal to you much but as time goes on you will realize they were necessary. The world never stops turning and attitudes never stop evolving and you must take steps to always evolve with them.

Anyone who tries to interfere in your personal affairs is going to wish they had found a different way to get themselves noticed. You are in one of those moods when you have no hesitation in backing up harsh words with equally harsh action!

Stop worrying about how you are going to make ends meet and focus on activities that will get you noticed and increase your chances of moving up in the world. Take care of your ambitions and your financial situation will work out better than you expected.

Give up any ideas you might have had about enjoying a restful long weekend because there will be a ton of tasks to get through between now and the start of next week. Identify what needs to be done, take a deep breath, then get on with it.

Family matters will go well this weekend as your ruling planet Mars links nicely with Venus in the domestic area of your chart. Don’t skimp on telling loved ones how much you adore them – the more open you are about your feelings the more they will adore you too.

Trust your instincts this weekend and don’t listen to those who claim to know more about certain subjects than you. Even if they do know more they don’t possess your knack for joining the dots and seeing the bigger picture – and it’s quite a sight!

The more sacrifices you have made in recent weeks the more entitled you will feel to bend the rules a bit now. Just be careful you don’t go too far and exceed the amount of goodwill you have managed to build up. There are limits.

Venus, planet of harmony, is not only moving through your birth sign but links up with Mars, planet of energy, this weekend. At the very least that means your love life will improve dramatically over the next few days. Seems you are flavor of the month again!

You may doubt that a colleague knows what they are doing but you have no option now but to sign up to their plans and hope they don’t lead you astray. The simple fact is your fate is in their hands, so help them make those plans work.

Venus in the area of your chart that governs group activities will encourage you to get together with friends old and new and enjoy your share of fun and games. This is one of those rare occasions when the serious stuff can be given a miss.

Your ruling planet Venus is not only moving through the career area of your chart at the moment but joins forces this weekend with Mars, planet of ambition. What does that mean in plain and simple language? It means you can’t lose, so go for it!

Focus on what is good in your life and put everything else out of your mind. This is one of the best weekends of the year for spending quality time with partners and loved ones, so give work a miss and do some fun things together.

The more a rival casts doubts on your plans the more you can be certain they are good plans. The reason they are so insistent that you change course is because they know that your efforts are going to make their own efforts look puny.

You may not have seen eye-to-eye with a loved one of late but today’s Venus-Mars link will bring you together again so you can resolve your differences and move ahead in unison. You are both good alone but you are great as a team.

This may be a busy time for you on the work front but you must still make time for family members. If they get the impression that you care more about your career than you do about them both your personal life and your professional status could suffer.

If there is someone in your life that you have been worshipping from afar now is the time to make your true feelings known. This weekend’s Venus-Mars link will make it easy for you to woo them and win them. It could be true love!

Although Saturn is strong on your birthday this year you must stay positive in your outlook, especially where one-to-one relationships are concerned. For every setback you encounter there will be several opportunities to strengthen important bonds of friendship and love.

You need to get your act together quickly, because there is a danger that you will be too laidback in your attitude and miss out on opportunities that are perfect for you. There is still plenty of time to do something amazing – or even several somethings!

It may look as if you are in a state of hibernation at the moment but just because you are not active in a visible sense does not mean your brain is not working. On the contrary, your mind will be on the go every single second today.

The pace of life may be hectic now but you have what it takes to stay ahead of the game. Your enthusiasm for one project in particular can take you to new heights of accomplishment over the coming week. Settle for nothing less than total success.

Don’t just sit back and wait for life to bring good stuff your way – get out there in the world and make it happen! The approaching new moon will bring opportunities that most people hardly dare dream about, but for you they are there for the taking.

You will have to juggle several tasks at once as the new week begins but that won’t worry you in the slightest, in fact you will enjoy the challenge. Your self-belief is such that the thought of failure won’t enter your head for a single moment.

If you know what you want there is no doubt at all that you can find a way to get it. Keep reminding yourself of that fact over the next few days and don’t be surprised when what you get is even more fantastic than you had hoped for.

Go out of your way to be nice to people today, because the more you give of yourself now the more the universe will give back to you around the time of Friday’s new moon. Being agreeable is not only good manners, it’s good business too.

If a colleague suggests that you work together on something that you suspect may not be entirely legitimate then you must be mentally and morally strong enough to say “no thank you”. You don’t need to break the rules to be a success.

You may think you don’t have enough money in the bank to do everything you want to do today but is that true or are you looking for excuses? Forget about how much your activities may cost and just go for them. You’ll find ways to pay.

The more someone tries to persuade you to tone down your ambitions the more obvious it will be that you are doing the right thing. The only reason they are trying to hold you back is because they fear your efforts will outshine their own – and they will!

Why are you trying so hard to live up to the expectations that other people have of you? Why put yourself under that sort of strain? The planets urge you to be your own person and do your own thing every minute of every day. Ignore everyone else.

Good fortune is heading your way and if it hasn’t arrived by the time the moon is new on Friday then your parents must have forgotten your correct date of birth. Be positive in thought and decisive in action and you WILL experience some kind of magic.

Don’t withdraw from the world and retreat into your shell. The message of your birthday chart is that the more you get out and about and get involved both personally and professionally the more of an impact you will make, and the happier you will be.

It is of the utmost importance that you permit yourself to be open to alternative viewpoints, even when some of those viewpoints are massively at odds with your own. Unless you listen to what other people say how will you ever come to understand them?

There is no point resisting something that is going to happen whether you agree with it or not. Instead, look ahead and try to work out what the consequences might be, then come up with ideas as to how you can make them work for you.

You must not take anything for granted now, especially where money matters are concerned. In fact, this is one of those times when it would be wise to be suspicious of people who say they can help with your problems. It’s more likely they will help themselves!

You don’t have to do anything special today but you do have to be aware that what friends and family members decide to do is going to impact you in some way. There is no way of knowing if that will be for the better or for the worse.

It will seem as if a great weight has been lifted from your shoulders today and the feeling of freedom you get will encourage you to do something outrageous. Don’t make it too outrageous though or that weight on your shoulders could soon be back!

Anyone who believes that you are insensitive to other people’s feelings will have to think again today as you show a great deal of empathy for someone who is down on their luck. Your words of compassion and encouragement will do your image no harm at all.

You seem to believe that everyone is against you at the moment but is that true or have you allowed a negative mindset to take hold for no good reason? Start thinking and acting as if everyone is your friend and see how that changes the picture.

You are trying to control so many things at the moment that you risk losing control of the lot. Instead of worrying about every last issue, focus on your three main areas of interests and forget about everything else until those three have been resolved.

You will need to be gentle with someone who is feeling rather fragile at the moment. They are unlikely to respond well to your usual “get a grip on yourself” attitude, so try sympathizing with their problems instead. A caring approach may actually work.

If a colleague comes up with an idea you wish you had thought of yourself there is no reason why you should not adopt it and adapt it to your own needs. There is no copyright on ideas, although there is the risk you might lose a friend.

Try to keep routine tasks to a minimum over the next 24 hours because you need to give yourself time to think about some of the deeper questions of life and you won’t be able to do that if you are immersed in housework. Do the cleaning tomorrow.

As Neptune, your ruler, begins its retrograde phase today you may find that you no longer care about matters that used to either inspire or enrage you. Life is too short to waste time on issues that cannot be resolved, at least not in this lifetime.

Mercury moves into the financial area of your chart on your birthday, so your thoughts will be drawn to matters relating to what you own and what you earn. Remember, making money is not a sin, especially if it buys the freedom to do exciting things.

Although everyone else on the work front seems happy to believe that they are doing the best possible job you are not convinced. Push yourself harder today and make sure you push your colleagues as well, because one or two of them have been taking it easy.

With Mercury opposing power planet Pluto today you are sure to encounter opposition from people in positions of authority. Don’t try to persuade them to see things your way because that won’t work. Instead, remove yourself from their presence and work on your own.

It may be easy to get annoyed with people who deliberately drag their feet but no matter how much you try to hurry them along today you won’t be successful. Just accept that for the time being at least if you want something done you must do it yourself.

Other people’s decisions will affect your financial situation over the next 24 hours, but now you are aware of that you can take steps to ensure you don’t lose out. Don’t be surprised though if one of those decisions actually makes a profit.

You can expect some kind of challenge today and it will most likely be of an intellectual nature. If a friend or colleague tries to show that your beliefs are wrong you must get your facts together and show them they don’t know what they are talking about.

If you make a mistake of some kind today just admit it and move on. With Mercury, your ruler, at odds with Pluto you won’t get away with claiming that it wasn’t your fault. You tried something different and it didn’t work out – but at least you tried.

Try not to get involved in the type of discussions that inevitably turn nasty. You know what topics to avoid and anyone who tries to drag you into arguing for and against must be made aware that you are not in the slightest bit interested in their views.

There is nothing you can do about a worrying situation other than to sit tight and watch how it develops over time. The bad news is it may in the end not work out the way that you wanted. The good news is it doesn’t matter one little bit.

You will see or hear something today that you know must be avoided, even at the risk of annoying people who were hoping to get you involved. Of course, not everyone is as perceptive as you, so help others to spot what’s going on as well.

You won’t lack for advice today but if you are smart you will ignore each and every word of it. The only guidance you need is what comes from that little voice inside you that seems to know all the answers. Listen to it – it’s never wrong.

Although you like to forgive and forget you will have no choice today but to come down hard on someone who has let you down. It does not matter if their actions were deliberate or accidental, they must be made aware of it so they don’t do it again.

Sometimes things happen that are too complicated to understand and if one such event occurs today all you can do is accept it and not let it get to you personally. Life will always have its ups and downs and none of them should be taken too seriously.

The more other people criticize what you are doing this year the more you will carry on doing it. Don’t be so stubborn though that you refuse to look into what they are saying. Some of their comments may be on the money – and could save you money too.

Make sure that everyone you have dealings with knows what you expect of them over the next 48 hours. If you leave things vague they will take that as an invitation to do less than their fair share – and then blame it on you.

Good news is coming your way and will arrive at your door either today, tomorrow or over the weekend. Communications of all kinds will go well for you now, so take the opportunity to let others know what you think and how you feel.

There is a clear path to move up in the world but you seem reluctant to take it. Why is that? If it’s because you feel you don’t have the experience to make a success of a higher position you are wrong – you will grow into the job.

Whatever inspires you the most in this world is what you must focus on now. Friends and colleagues may say you should instead be doing this or doing that but they are wrong. You will only be happy if you follow your heart.

You must take responsibility not only for your own actions but for the actions of other people too. The approaching new moon will help everyone see what needs to be done but only you have the inner and outer strength to make it happen.

If you are clear in your own mind about the direction you want to be travelling then nothing and no one can stop you. The more friends and family members say they have doubts the more determined you must be to go the distance.

You may be worried that by following a certain course of action you will leave yourself open to your rivals getting on your case if it turns out wrong but that is a risk you must take. The time for doubts is long since past.

It would be nice if family members and friends could show some support for your latest endeavour but if they cannot then it’s no big deal. You have the drive and the determination to get it done with them or without them cheering you on.

If you keep your eyes and ears open there is every chance you will come across a major money-making opportunity over the next few days. Tomorrow’s new moon will provide the circumstances that could enable you to get seriously rich.

The world is starting to look like a much brighter and friendlier place than it has been of late and the upcoming new moon will call forth events that remind you of all the good things in life you have to be thankful for.

No matter how passionate you may be about an idea of some kind you have to accept that not everyone sees it the same way as you – and some of them never will. You don’t need their support, just as they don’t need yours.

The approaching new moon in your fellow water sign of Cancer makes this one of the best times of the year for creative activities. Whatever you find yourself getting passionate about just go for it. The universe is on your side.

Your sense of adventure will be such over the coming year that if even a single day goes by without you doing something new you will be disappointed. The world is very much your playground now, so by all means go wild.

There were times in recent weeks when one worry seemed to arrive hot on the heels of another but today’s new moon signals an end to that emotional treadmill. Happy days will be here again if your thoughts are relentlessly positive.

The more some people say that what you are working on is a waste of time and effort the more you will do it just to spite them. What they think is of no importance at all. The only thing that matters is your own delight in life.

Don’t worry too much if you have to give up something you have grown attached to in recent months, because the new moon is sure to replace it with something many times better. Was it really so great, or was it just a habit?

Today’s new moon in your sign will ignite a passion – for a person, for an idea, for a goal – that was previously lacking in your life. Having found your calling you must then give it your full and undivided attention. It’s your future.

A new moon in the area of your chart that governs your deepest thoughts and desires will answer most of your questions, and sweep away the doubts that have been plaguing you. Your world is about to turn right-side up again.

You are well aware that happiness comes from doing the right thing and what you do over the next few days will improve the lives of those around you and make you very happy indeed. Hold on to that joy as long as you can.

A window of opportunity is opening on the work front and you must take advantage of it. If you hesitate for even a minute you could lose out to a rival who, while not as talented as you, is quicker off the mark.

Great things are beginning to happen around you and soon they will be happening to you as well. The most important factor is that you believe with all your heart that you deserve this good fortune, because there is no doubt that you do.

You can see the light at the end of the tunnel and what you do today will take you towards it at whatever speed you choose to travel. Don’t move so fast though that you fail to notice the many points of interest along the way.

A relationship issue you had forgotten about will come to the surface again and this time you can and you must deal with it once and for all. The new moon will make it easy for you to make sensible concessions and meet them halfway.

Approach what is expected of you in a positive frame of mind and make sure you give it 100 per cent effort over the next 24 hours. Your talent for getting to the root of a problem quickly will impress senior colleagues and your employer.

Your sense of humour is such that you can find comedy in most things in life, but you need to remember that not everyone is as off-beat as you. That doesn’t mean though that there are certain topics you must avoid. That’s just self-censorship.

Not only is there a new moon on your birthday but Mars and Saturn are strong as well, which means the coming year could be and should be the most productive time of your life. Greatness awaits you, so reach out and grab it.

You may have to get pushy this weekend, if only to remind certain people that they need to up their game if they want a place on your team. But don’t go too far and give them an excuse to push back and make it a tug of war!

Energy plus enthusiasm will take you from where you are now to where you most want to be. Mars in your sign means you have the drive and the determination not just to start a new project but to see it through to the end.

Try not to be too aggressive over the next 24 hours. You may have a valid reason for being angry with someone but yelling and shouting won’t win them round. Instead, give them logical reasons why it’s in their interests to change their ways.

Once you take the first big step towards an objective there will be no stopping you – momentum will kick in and soon you will be speeding along. Don’t worry about any obstacles you might find in your path, just soar over them and keep going.

You cannot control every little thing that goes on in your environment but you can control the one big thing on which everything else depends. Make it your aim this weekend to focus on what truly matters while ignoring all the irrelevant gossip and trivia.

The possibility of failure must not be allowed to take root in your mind, because once it is there it will be extremely hard to get rid of again. Make things easier for yourself by not setting the bar for achievement at a ridiculously high level.

Your self-belief will soar this weekend and your ideas and creativity on the work front will impress people in positions of power. A positive attitude when dealing with difficult tasks could take you a very long way in a relatively short space of time.

You don’t have to pretend that you care about a certain person when in reality you would prefer to have nothing to do with them. It is perfectly okay to have likes and dislikes – it is part of the human condition. Just don’t take them to extremes.

If someone you don’t usually get along with becomes excessively friendly toward you over the next 48 hours you must ask yourself what it is you possess that they might desire. Do you want to give it to them? Can you even afford to?

Radical changes may be taking place in the world around you but that does not mean you must change radically as well. People trust you for your common sense and your steady approach to life’s challenges, and would prefer you to stay as you are.

The best way to help yourself is to help other people, especially when it comes to dealing with fears that you share. Do your best to resolve any anxieties that friends and loved ones may be having. At the very least it will take your mind off your problems.

A choice you make concern­ing a long-term relationship will affect the lives of other people too, so think carefully before you make a move you cannot go back on. The planets suggest you don’t have to make a lasting break, at least not all in one go.

Confidence in your own abilities will take you a long way over the coming 12 months, maybe further than you have ever been before. More important by far, however, is that you have clear-cut aims both in your personal affairs and in your career.

You may be inclined to trust your hunches but if someone whose judgment you value advises caution today it would be smart to listen. It could be they can see a pitfall that you, in your haste to push ahead, have somehow overlooked.

Venus, your ruler, is strong in the area of your chart that governs travel plans and social activities, and you must make the most of it. A few days from now there will be more serious matters to deal with, so have fun while you can.

Others may be of the opinion that the more material things they possess the happier they will be but that is certainly not true for you. The only sort of possession that matters now is the affection you get from the people you love.

Identify your No. 1 passion and go after it with every ounce of physical, mental and emotional energy you possess. The sun remains in your sign just two more weeks, so get a move on and start making some really good things happen.

You seem to be paying far too much attention to what other people are saying and not enough to what your inner self is trying to tell you. Make a point of tuning out other voices today and listen only to that small voice within your own heart.

What happens today will in some way make it clear that every single thing that happens in your life, be it good or bad, is part of a much wider and much higher cosmic plan. So why worry when everything is destined to come right in the end?

Although someone in a position of power has clearly made a big impression on you in recent weeks you must not follow them blindly. You are still your own boss and ultimately the decisions you make must be for your own benefit.

The sun in Cancer at this time of year urges you to start something new. Focus on an ambition you have been thinking about for months, maybe even years, and make it your one and only objective. This is not the right time to be cautious.

You suspect that a loved one has been keeping things from you and it is driving you mad that they might know something that you do not. But don’t let your frustration show or they will delight in keeping you in the dark a little longer.

You appear to be flavour of the month with all the right people at the moment, and that’s great, but don’t just sit back and bask in their praise. Your priority now must be to make use of their support to promote your own interests.

You may be tempted to escape from your problems by retreating into your shell and pretending that the outside world does not exist but that approach won’t work for long. Engage with life’s challenges – they are not as tough as you fear.

You may be tempted to go over the top emotionally but if you do it’s no big deal. As one of the more sensitive members of the zodiac there is no point trying to pretend that certain matters don’t affect you when everyone can see they do.

Someone who is currently no more than a casual friend will become a whole lot more important to you over the coming year. You have been growing closer for quite some time and soon the magnetism between you will become intense.

You need to accept the fact that different people have different outlooks on life and won’t always see things the same way as you. There is room in the world for all shades of opinion, so try embracing your differences. Learn from each other.

If you go out of your way to be sociable today other people will respond in kind and even entrust you with information you can make use of. That won’t be your motivation, of course, but there’s no law against benefiting from what you hear.

Money matters seem to be causing you some concern at the moment but are your cashflow problems real or are they illusions created by your fertile imagination? Most likely it’s the latter, so stop worrying and let fate take its course.

This is a special time of year and you certainly feel special but don’t think you can do as you please and get away with it. Experience should have taught you that when you feel strongest is often when you are at your most vulnerable.

Why are you continually looking over your shoulder as if something nasty is creeping up on you? The sun in the most sensitive area of your chart can at times be hard to deal with but don’t make it even harder by being overly fearful.

Don’t just accept what a so-called expert tells you today – check each and every fact and figure and then check them again to be on the safe side. By the time you have finished you will probably be more of an expert than they are.

Make sure that your employer and other important people in your working sphere know who you are and what you can do. It doesn’t matter how good you may be at your job you will only get noticed if you push your face to the front.

Whatever kind of news comes your way today, be it good, bad or indifferent, you must not go overboard about it. Yes, of course, you need to be aware of what other people are doing but what you are doing matters a thousand times more.

Try not to be obsessive about issues that are important to you but which you know you cannot alter. The world is what it is and isn’t about to change just because you don’t like parts of it. Look to your own needs over the next 24 hours.

Fun and romance may be high on your agenda at the moment but that does not mean you can ignore what is going on elsewhere in your environment. Why is a colleague so moody and withdrawn? Find out and help them get over it.

Matters of the head and matters of the heart will draw you in different directions today but you can and you must deal with them all. You need to get organized though – just taking events as they come will likely be a recipe for disaster.

Get unstuck from your rut and do something dramatic. You may be content to sit back and watch the passing parade – and there is certainly plenty in the parade to laugh at – but at this time of year you should be taking part, maybe even leading.

Someone you are close to emotionally must be allowed to spread their wings and soar. Although Cancer is a wonderfully nurturing sign you can be a bit clingy at times. Give them space to be themselves and they will love you even more.

You can tell a friend what they want to hear or you can tell them what they need to hear. Choose the first if you want a quiet day; choose the second if you feel they should know the facts rather than continuing to mislead themselves.

Try not to get too caught up with ideas about winning and losing. It’s nice to be No. 1, of course, but it’s not the most important thing at the moment – that honour goes to being the charitable human being who puts other people first.

If you get the urge to travel today then just pack a bag and go. According to the planets there is nothing of any great importance holding you back, so allow your spirit of adventure to lead you in whatever direction it feels most attracted to.

As values planet Venus moves into the financial area of your chart tomorrow it might be wise not to go wild with the credit cards. All those little purchases you made over the past few weeks have been adding up to a considerable debt.

Ignore the critics and cynics and push ahead with your plans. The world is divided into two types of people: those who follow up on their promises with action and those who say they will act but never seem to get round to it.

You must be 100 per cent sure that it’s the right thing for you before starting a task that is going to take up a large slice of your time and attention, maybe on a daily basis. It’s all or nothing: go for it or give up on it.

If a friend goes against your advice and does something you believe is reckless there really is nothing you can do about it. Either they will prove you wrong and make a success of it or you can help them pick up the pieces later on.

Take time out today to look back over the first half of the year and ask yourself if the goals you set have all been reached. If the answer is No don’t get upset. There is still time to make your mark, but you need to get serious.

There is a danger that your expectations are too high and, as a consequence, you won’t reach the success levels you had hoped for. There is no shame in adjusting your sights a bit to improve your chances, in fact it’s a very wise move.

Money matters will take center stage over the next few days and if you have been too free and easy with your cash of late then you may have to cut back a bit. Is there anything you paid a fortune for that you can now sell on?

Don’t be too hard on yourself if something you have been working on has to be abandoned between now and the weekend. Yes, it’s a failure of sorts, but it’s also a useful learning experience and next time you will surely get it right.

What happens today will no doubt take you by surprise but looking back from the end of the week you will recognize that you should have seen it coming. The fact is you were willfully blind to reason purely through emotion.

If you react quickly to the next big opportunity that comes your way – and it could be with you in a matter of hours – you will steal a march on your rivals and impress your superiors. Don’t wait for permission, seize the initiative!

Stop trying to be perfect and just be yourself. As Venus moves into the most dynamic area of your chart today you don’t need to put on an act, because the world wants to see the real you, the you they have come to admire so much.

The more someone appeals to your sense of duty the more you should be on your guard. Almost certainly their ultimate aim is to get you doing all the hard stuff while they sit back and take it easy. You must not let that happen.

When dealing with people in positions of power it will pay you to be less trusting than you usually are. Saturn in the career area of your chart is going through one of its retrograde phases, which means you need to keep your guard up 24 hours a day.

As Venus moves into the money area of your chart today you may be tempted to go on a spree but if you do you will regret it over the weekend when you have to watch the pennies while your friends and colleagues are having lots of fun.

By all means focus on your work today but schedule some down time too. The influence of Venus in your sign over the next few weeks means you will do better in all areas, not just socially and romantically, if you adopt a more easygoing outlook on life.

If someone you work or do business with throws their weight around today you must not get angry – just turn your back and walk away. They will soon realize how important you are to their plans and come running after you full of regret.

Do whatever it takes (within reason) to stay on the good side of people in positions of authority. If you show willing and make more of an effort than your colleagues they will make a note of it and maybe even promote you in the near future.

If a friend or relative tells you something you don’t want to hear today that’s too bad – you need to be made aware of what’s really going on, because if you carry on walking round with your eyes shut you could end up bumping into something that hurts!

Someone you work alongside may try to take liberties today and if they do you must come down on them quickly and hard. You may be a nice guy by nature but that is not an invitation for others to take advantage of your generous nature.

A clash of egos is likely today but with a little goodwill it can be stopped from degenerating into an unseemly fight. The fact is you are both on the same side and should be directing your energy and anger at those who would do you both harm.

You may need to soothe someone who seems to believe you have it in for them. The most important thing now is harmony both at home and at work, because there are more important things to worry about than gossip about who said this and who said that.

Don’t rock the boat or say things you know won’t go down well on the work front. Saturn in your sign warns that your rivals are as aware of your failings as you are of theirs and are itching for an excuse to draw attention to them.

A sun-Saturn link on your birthday will endow you with the self-discipline you need to get important things done but don’t forget to lighten up once in a while. All work and no play may be a recipe for success but not for happiness.

You should be at peace with the world now that love planet Venus has moved into your fellow fire sign of Leo. However, don’t let that blind you to the fact that not everyone you deal with is likely to be honest. Keep your wits about you.

You won’t find cash hard to come by today and over the weekend but you may find it hard to hold on to. Still, if spending money makes you happy then go for it – and spend some on other people too so the happiness gets spread around.

Good fortune is most likely to come your way from a friend or from a group of people with whom you have close social links. The more you get out and about today the more likely it is you will gain on both a personal and a professional level.

It does not matter if the whole world is moving in one direction – if your inner voice tells you to move in the opposite direction then that is what you must do. Refusing to follow the crowd did you no harm in the past and can’t harm you now.

Life looks good at the moment and will look even better if you refuse to worry yourself with the sort of petty concerns that some people get riled up about. If everyone had such a positive outlook on life the world would be a much nicer place.

Go out of your way to be agreeable with everyone you meet today, even those people who tend to rub you up the wrong way the moment they open their mouths. Your positive attitude will have an encouraging knock-on effect on those around you.

Can wishes come true? They can if you believe in them enough and if you are prepared to back up your dreams with hard work. Some people say Librans are too lazy to fulfil their potential but you will prove them wrong today and over the weekend.

It may be true that negative thoughts attract negative results but the opposite is true as well and if you adopt an optimistic outlook today then good things will come your way. Cosmic attraction is a real power that you can harness for your own benefit.

Take time out of your busy schedule to let someone know how much you love them. Chances are they know already but it never hurts to labor the point and Venus in one of the best areas of your chart will make it easy for you to be affectionate.

Don’t worry if you don’t feel like making much of an effort today as there is always tomorrow and the day after that and … One of the things you need to do less of is to set yourself rigid goals and deadlines. Take life as it comes.

With love planet Venus moving though the relationship area of your chart you won’t be able to hide your feelings for a special person – and why would you want to? You may not be the most emotional member of the zodiac but you have your moments!

If you have fallen out with a friend or a work colleague then take steps today to get your relationship back on track. You have a lot more in common than what keeps you apart, so resolve your differences and find ways to get along.

As love planet Venus opposes passion planet Pluto on your birthday there are sure to be some strong emotions flying about over the coming year. Make sure you keep a clear dividing line between affairs of the heart and your financial and business interests.

If you make a mess of something this weekend you must not try to cover it up. Friends and colleagues will be more inclined to forgive and forget if you hold up your hand and admit your error. They may even praise you for your honesty.

Your No. 1 priority over the next 48 hours must be to go out and have fun with your friends. If you get stuck in the office you may look back a week or so from now and wish you had not been quite such a workaholic.

It may be tempting to spend your way out of your current low mood but common sense should tell you that in the long-term that could make matters worse. Instead, find yourself a quiet space and meditate on all the good things you have in your life.

Make the most of the next few days because when the sun leaves your sign on the 22nd it may not be so easy to focus on your own needs and desires. In fact, if you don’t get an important project finished soon you could run out of time.

Your ability to see through lies and deceptions will come in handy this weekend as you will be called on to deal with people whose motives seem a bit suspect. Don’t listen so much to what they are saying, watch what they are actually doing.

What a friend or loved one tells you this weekend may be the opposite of what you wanted to hear but if you are smart you will bow to their greater experience and follow their advice. There is no shame in admitting that others know better than you.

The bigger the challenge the more you will like it over the next few days – in fact you may actually go looking for dragons to slay. You are in one of those moods when you feel the need to prove yourself, so the bigger the threat the better.

It is not in your nature to compromise but at some point over the next 48 hours you will have to retreat from your current position and meet others halfway. Just because you have drawn a red line does not mean you have to stick with it.

What you think you see and what is actually there could be two entirely different things this weekend. No, it’s not your eyesight that’s at fault, it’s your expectations – you seem to have persuaded yourself that white is black and right is wrong.

Assess your aims carefully before going after them this weekend. A little bit of thought will go a long way, especially if you are the kind of Capricorn who tends to jump in where angels fear to tread. In other words, look before you leap!

You have no option but to roll up your sleeves and get stuck into a task you would like to get finished by the start of next week. The longer you sit there looking at it the closer the deadline will loom and the harder your labour will be.

What occurs this weekend has the potential to make up for a lot of previous disappointments, but only if you are alert to what’s going on around you. If an opportunity arises you must go for it instantly – you’ve done enough thinking and now need to act.

You may not realize it but you are on the verge of an important breakthrough, one that can change your life for the better on numerous levels, so get serious about your ambitions and cut out the late nights. Work must come first this year.

What seemed such a difficult situation over the weekend won’t seem so difficult now and you must take advantage of that fact to push ahead with your plans, especially on the work front where decisive action could lead to the making of some serious money.

Mars and Uranus join forces in your sign today, which among other things suggests there will be major disruptions over the course of the week. Those disruptions are more likely to work in your favour if you are the one who sets them off.

Your enthusiasm may take a bit of a dive as the new week begins but that’s no bad thing and could in fact be a good thing if it means you are not quite so hyperactive as you have been of late. Try slowing down once in a while.

A minor setback could knock you off your stride today but the planets indicate you will be back on course by this time tomorrow, so don’t make a big issue of it. Besides, life would be extremely boring if everything always went according to plan.

You seem to be a lot happier with your lot of late, and that’s great, but you must not settle into the kind of self-satisfied mood that stifles your creative instincts. By all means take it easy today but keep looking and planning ahead.

There is no reason why your recent run of good luck should not continue and what happens today will open up new possibilities and make it possible for the future to be even better than the past. Don’t lower your expectations, raise them higher!

You may not want to admit that you were wrong about something but there is nothing to be gained by pretending that a decision you took was a good one. In the greater scheme of things it may not amount to much but you can still learn from it.

You may be at a loss to understand why a loved one is behaving badly but their anger cannot be ignored. Most likely they will be back to normal by this time tomorrow but it will pay you to find out why they are suddenly so hostile.

The harder you have pushed yourself in recent weeks the more essential it is now to ease back a bit and take time out from your labours. Even a dynamic Sag needs to recharge their physical, mental and emotional batteries once in a while.

A simple situation could quickly get complicated today and you will need to keep your wits about you if you are to stay on top of it. You may be panicking a bit on the inside but don’t let the outside world see it is getting to you.

It amazes you that some people can get worked up over the most ridiculous things but not everyone can be as emotionally detached as you, so make allowances when dealing with loved ones and co-workers. Do what you can to help them get a grip.

Travel and social plans will be disrupted today but if you stay calm and adapt as you go along you will still get where you need to be and have a lot of fun along the way. The best way to deal with unexpected changes is to embrace them.

You have made a number of life-changing decisions over the past year or so and because of those decisions your future looks exceedingly rosy. But don’t stop there because in several areas you still have unfinished, and potentially profitable, business to take care of.

Is a relationship really at crisis point or are you overreacting to the kind of situation you have dealt with successfully so many times before? Quiet your mind and take a few deep breaths, then find ways to work it out between you.

Upheavals of one sort or another are inevitable over the next few days but in the long-term they will work in your favour, so instead of feeling sorry for yourself try using the opportunities those upheavals bring to benefit yourself financially and professionally.

If there is something you really, really desire try holding the image of it in your mind for the next 24 hours and you may be amazed to find that it comes to you as if by magic. One way or another the universe will provide what you crave.

It’s time to sweep away all those old and outdated ideas that may have worked for you in the past but are now holding you back. Use the power of the Sun in your sign to upgrade your understanding of what life is about to a much higher level.

Choose your words carefully today because it will be easy for you to say something hurtful that is very hard to take back later on. Not everyone takes criticism well (you least of all) so find ways to get your message across that are not emotionally damaging.

The more a colleague insists that they can be trusted the more you must be on your guard. It’s not their words you should be paying attention to but their track record of promises kept and promises broken – and it’s really not that great.

By all means express yourself loudly and forcefully today but don’t be surprised if you get some pushback from people who don’t like to be told what they should be doing. Never mind, it’s their loss if they refuse to take your criticism on board.

You may not want to come down hard on a friend or family member who has been taking liberties but if you don’t do it now you will have to do it later when the consequences are likely to be even messier. It’s time to get tough.

You may be out of step with those who say the best approach to current difficulties is to be cautious but that does not mean you are wrong. If your instincts tell you to go for a more radical approach you would be a fool to ignore them.

The more criticism you get from a colleague or someone in a position of power the more certain you can be that your recent observations about their behaviour have touched a nerve. Don’t back off – repeat what you know to be true until the message sinks in.

Your intuition has been operating on a higher level in recent weeks and what it reveals to you today must not be disregarded. Even if the whole wide world disagrees with your conclusions they are almost certainly correct, at least for you.

A problem that has been taxing your brain for weeks, maybe months, has in fact got an amazingly simple solution and it will pop into your head at some point today. Often, when you stop thinking so hard the answers come so much easier.

Your birthday message is that life is not a zero-sum game – other people don’t have to lose so that you can win. The more you strive to help others this year the more the universe will help you. Life is always win-win if you want it to be.

If you are losing interest in something you have been working on for the past few weeks it may be because you can sense you are destined for bigger and better things – and you’re right, you are. Why push ahead with something that no longer inspires you?

You may think you can do 10 things at once and do them all well but you are wrong. The message of the stars today is that you need to cut your commitments back to the bone. Do one thing really well and leave it at that.

The planets warn this is probably not the best time to gamble with your cash or take on any kind of risky new venture. Also, be wary of people who look and sound as if they know what they are talking about but refuse to offer you firm guarantees.

You must expect a few upheavals in the run up to the sun leaving your sign at the start of next week but they don’t have to be traumatic. Upsets of an emotional nature are probably best dealt with by pretending they do not exist.

You don’t have to choose between pleasure and duty – there is room for them both in your life – but over the next 24 hours you will have to put yourself out more for other people. In return, they will feel it’s their duty to bring pleasure to you!

Don’t waste time and energy trying to keep other people’s schemes afloat because you can see they are not going to work. Why use up your precious resources helping them salvage their dreams when your own dreams are so much more attainable?

Go out of your way to be nice to someone who, while not a close friend, is certainly a colleague or contact it will pay to have on your side. What you do for them now they will happily do for you later on in the year.

You won’t change other people’s beliefs by coming on strong and beating them over the head with facts and figures. Your arguments may be persuasive but what if they don’t want to be convinced? Try offering them something that will buy their support.

It’s not like you to lack confidence but the sun’s journey through one of the more sensitive areas of your chart of late has depressed your expectations a bit. Never mind. Come the start of next week you’ll be back to your go-getting best.

You need to accept that there are some battles in life that can never be won and one such battle is right there in front of you now. Accept that it’s not worth fighting over a lost cause and find a way to back away from it gracefully.

The planets warn if you come on too strong over the next 24 hours you run the risk of creating enemies that did not exist before. A more measured approach to negotiating with colleagues and rivals is the best way to bring lasting success.

As the sun nears the end of its journey through the most dynamic area of your sign you can and you must bring a project of some kind to a conclusion. You have already achieved more than expected so don’t push too hard and risk losing those gains.

It’s your life and it must always be your decision as to what you are going to do with it. Having said that, don’t close your ears to advice this year because a friend may see opportunities that you cannot. Your dream could be their dream too.

The planets suggest that some sort of breakthrough is imminent, either in your career or financially, and what occurs over the next 24 hours is sure to convince you that this time it is not a false alarm. When the opportunity comes you must embrace it.

The sun’s link to Uranus today means not only that something out of the ordinary is going to happen but that it will come about in the most welcome way. Be ready to move at a moment’s notice and don’t feel sorry for those who get left behind.

Some changes happen so quickly that even quick-witted Geminis get taken by surprise. The good news is that what occurs today, while unexpected, won’t faze you at all. With some serious dollars at stake you won’t be playing catch-up for long.

There seems to be an added urgency to your activities at the moment, no doubt caused by the realization that time is fast running out. You can sense that if you don’t act now you could lose the chance to act at all, so get a move on!

Abrupt developments in your career could send you into a tailspin today but you won’t be confused or anxious for long. The sun’s upcoming move into your sign will give you the confidence to take setbacks in your stride, and maybe even profit from them.

Something marvellous will happen between now and the weekend but while it may be great fun for you not everyone will be happy that their lives have been turned upside-down. Make it your business to remind them that, in a universal sense, all change is good.

Don’t bother trying to move events in the direction you want them to go because today’s sun-Uranus link means your efforts will probably be wasted. Your best course of action by far is to stay loose and react to events as and when they occur.

There is a strong possibility that partners and colleagues will disagree with your plans today and if they do you must ask them why. It could be the case that they can see pitfalls that you in your haste have managed to overlook. Maybe you should be thanking them.

What takes place today may not be to your liking but there is no point making a fuss because there are forces at work that are too powerful to be opposed. All you can do, at least for now, is to hold tight and pretend to enjoy the ride.

What can you do to help make the world a better place? The planets indicate that if you want to make a real difference you should use your talent for organization to bring similar people together. Many minds are better than just the one.

Uranus, your ruler, makes a helpful link to the sun today, which means you have the power to change not just your own way of looking at the world but the way other people see reality as well. Find creative ways to get your message across.

You may be changeable by nature but sometimes you get so focused on something, an ambition, a project or a relationship, that nothing can deflect you away from your goal. You won’t have to react to events today – events will react to you.

The social side of your nature will come to the fore this year but you must be careful what you spend because you could easily rack up debts while having fun. The more party invitations you receive the more selective you will need to be.

Mars, your ruling planet, is about to move into the most eloquent area of your chart, so don’t be afraid to speak up and let others know your opinions. Even if they disagree with you they will be impressed by the confident way you present your arguments.

There are some powerful emotions doing the rounds at the moment, so be on your guard and try not to get caught up in the inevitable chaos. No matter how excited friends and loved ones may be you must stay calm and stick to the facts.

The next few days will be some of the best of the year for starting new projects and if you make the right moves you will enjoy the kind of success you hardly dared dream of earlier in the year. Put aside your doubts and go for it.

You may prefer to stay out of the limelight but the current cosmic picture means you are unlikely to get much choice in the matter – the world wants to know your name and what you are up to. Put on a show for your adoring public.

The more of an effort you make to communicate with people whose ideas and beliefs reflect your own the more you will enjoy yourself today and over the weekend. New friendships will be easily made and they promise to be extremely profitable.

You must not give in to pressure today, not even when it comes from people in positions of authority. Listen to what they say but don’t think you are obliged to follow their orders to the letter. You have a mind of your own, so use it!

If you have been thinking of a major change in your life, maybe switching careers or moving away from your current location, now is the time to get serious about it. There can be no more excuses for doing nothing, it’s time to break out of your comfort zone.

You will have to be ruthless with someone who has been benefiting from your protection in ways that are clearly not good for them or for you. However much of a friend they may be you can no longer afford to carry them, especially financially.

As Mars moves into your opposite sign over the next few days you may have to do things for partners and loved ones that don’t feel right. Help them if you can but make sure they know this can be nothing more than a short-term arrangement.

You may be tempted to push yourself ever harder on the work front so that employers and colleagues know what you are capable of but don’t overdo it. They are unlikely to be impressed if you exhaust yourself, so know your limits and stay within them.

The planets warn if you let your standards slip over the next few days it may be very hard to raise them up again, so don’t be tempted to compromise your beliefs, your values or your ambitions. An honest life is more valuable than an easy life.

As Mars is about to move into the domestic area of your chart it’s likely that family matters could be a little disruptive. No matter what loved ones may say and do, if you stay calm then any problems between you can be easily settled.

You may have all the talent in the world but unless you can harness it to vision and effort you are unlikely to fulfil your potential. Make this the year when you finally get serious about making your mark on the world – and make sure it’s a positive one!

You have a tendency to leave things until the very last minute and usually that approach works well, but you will need to be more organized this weekend. On the work front, especially, you could fall out of favour if you miss an important deadline.

You must be open about what you are doing and honest about what you know you cannot do. The full moon warns if you try to muddle through or make claims you won’t be able to keep you will soon be found out, with potentially disastrous results.

Don’t worry too much about a financial matter that appears to have no solution, because the planets warn it will resolve itself when the time is right. In fact, the worse things look over the next 48 hours the more likely it is that a breakthrough will occur.

This weekend’s full moon in your opposite sign of Capricorn means you would be wise not to expect others to think and act like you. The more heavy-handed your approach the more likely it is they will get stubborn and dig in their heels.

Although life may seem a bit subdued at the moment the pace will pick up from Monday when the sun enters your sign. Your only goal this weekend must be to conserve your energy, physical and mental, so you are ready for big changes up ahead.

Be careful what you say this weekend because some people are going to be awfully touchy and a word out of place or even the wrong sort of look could set them off. Your criticisms may be valid but do you really want to be the villain of the piece?

It is inevitable that someone will make a drama out of a crisis over the next 48 hours and all you can do is keep your head down and don’t let their hysterical nonsense get to you. By the start of next week the emotional storm will be over.

Life has been enjoyable of late but a change is coming and over the next few days you are going to have to get serious about your long-term ambitions. Get out and about and have fun this weekend but start thinking about the future as well.

Your No. 1 aim this weekend must be to make sure you don’t spend too much money. A full moon in the financial area of your chart could easily tempt you to splash out on things you probably don’t need and most certainly cannot afford.

A full moon in your sign this weekend means you will need to call on all your powers of self-control, especially when dealing with people whose outlook on life seems irresponsible or even dangerous. Have as little to do with them as you possibly can.

There will be times this weekend when it seems as if you are the only one who does not know what is going on but it really isn’t that bad. Come Monday morning you will probably find that no-one else knew what was going on either!

The past few weeks have been hugely creative and some of the ideas you came up with were touched by genius. Now though you most decide which of those ideas are worth taking forward. Aim to do just one or two things really well.

You can no longer afford to coast along in the same old groove and living off the same old glories. Over the coming year events will conspire to force you to move in a new direction – a direction that will bring even greater successes than before.

The sun moves into the most dynamic area of your chart today and if you didn’t have a spring in your step before you certainly will now. Forget about recent disappointments and think and act as if you cannot possibly lose – and you won’t!

What happens next may seem like a significant setback but even if it is you will benefit from stepping back a bit and taking a wider view of what is going on in your life. The fact is you have been too close to your problems of late.

The more pressure you have been under in recent weeks the more you will benefit now the sun is moving into one of the more positive areas of your chart. Get out and about as much as you can, because new friendships will bring new opportunities.

As the sun leaves your sign today it will pay you to look back over the past few weeks and evaluate what has gone right and what has gone wrong. Without a shadow of a doubt you have made huge strides and can be proud of yourself.

A new solar year begins for you today, so put any and all disappointments out of your head and look to the future with happiness and hope. Why feel sorry about your failures when the universe promises that what comes next will be truly amazing?

You may feel a bit subdued and unwilling to join in with social activities today but that’s no bad thing. Your main aim over the next few weeks must be to look deeply into yourself and confront not just your fears but your motivations as well.

You should know by now that trying to impose your beliefs on other people isn’t going to work, so forget about trying to win over the doubters and mix only with those who share your outlook on life. You need friends more than followers.

The sun moves into the career area of your chart today and almost immediately you will feel a strong desire to come up with a plan that can move you rapidly up the professional ladder. Make sure it’s a plan that is grounded in reality, not wishful thinking.

You will discover something on your travels today that reminds you it is never a good idea to look at life as if everything is going to stay the same. There are some major upheavals on your horizon and it’s your responsibility to be ready for them.

Over the next few weeks you will be confronted with a number of interesting and attractive possibilities but you must look at them in detail before committing time, energy and money. Who is likely to benefit most, you or your would-be partners?

The sun’s move into your opposite sign marks the halfway point of the solar year. Take time out of your busy schedule to look back over the past six months and evaluate both the good and the bad – then get back into the fight and start winning again.

Don’t let it annoy you if you are required to take a back seat to someone whose abilities are clearly on a lower level than your own. When they mess things up – and they will – the powers that be will turn to you to put things right.

If you find yourself torn between opposing ambitions this year, go for the one that brings benefits to other people as well as yourself. No matter how high you may rise and no matter how much money you may make, helping others will bring the greatest joy.

The more time you make for other people today the more time the universe will make for you as you seek to improve the quality of your existence. Everything in life is connected and everyone gains when you make a conscious decision to help each other.

Life may get a bit disorganized over the next 24 hours but that is not necessarily a bad thing. Sometimes mapping out your steps in too much detail can limit the creative side of your nature, so give yourself permission to keep things messy.

A sun-Pluto link on your birthday means you will have serious issues to deal with over the next 12 months and because of that it is essential that you maintain a positive attitude at all times. If you control your thoughts then you control your reality as well.

You will be at your imperious best today. Anyone who thinks they can take you on will learn the hard way that when you are in this kind of commanding mood you are simply unbeatable. Even the toughest of rivals won’t stand a chance.

Trust your instincts and act on what they tell you quickly and decisively. The more other people say you are tempting fate and heading for a fall the more fun you will have proving them wrong. The so-called experts don’t know what they are talking about.

You will accomplish more over the next 24 hours than most people accomplish in a month. You are so pumped up and ready for action that even the toughest of tasks won’t faze you in the slightest. You know you’re a winner and soon everyone else will too.

No matter how stormy things get today if you refuse to panic you will come through unscathed. Your cardinal nature means that while colleagues and rivals are running here, there and everywhere like headless chickens you will stay calm and thrive.

Stop dreaming about what you are going to do and actually start doing it. The sun in your sign means you have all the tools you need to create something outstanding, something that has the potential to transform your existence. So start creating!

Some of the ideas that are floating around in your mind are pretty explosive and if you are smart you will keep them to yourself for the time being. Not everyone is ready to hear about your radical solutions to all the world’s problems!

If someone offers you what you want most on a plate you will, of course, be suspicious, but the good news is they really do want you to have it. Think of it as a deserved reward for all the good things you did for them in the past.

Changes on the work front will improve your life in a number of ways over the next few weeks but not all of them will be easy to begin with. Take the rough with the smooth and recognize that the occasional setback makes success taste even sweeter.

There is no such thing as a perfect time of year but the sun in the most adventurous area of your chart certainly makes this seem like one. Don’t sit at home waiting for good things to come your way – get out there and make them happen!

Something you have been trying to ignore for several weeks can no longer be disregarded. Resolve to get to grips with the situation and then move on from it once and for all. If you face up to it now it won’t ever bother you again.

If you keep telling yourself that you cannot fail then your belief will sooner or later make it a fact. Don’t try to do it all on your own though – you have friends and allies who would love nothing more than to work alongside you.

Something that previously confused you will start to make sense today, mainly because the way you look at it has been shifted by recent events. Once the missing piece of the jigsaw has fallen into place you will realize it was all part of a higher plan.

There is no doubt at all that you will get what you want from life this year and having got it you must then turn your attention to helping loved ones get what they want as well. Good fortune is like manure, it works best when spread around!

The best way to solve your current dilemma is to approach it from a completely different angle. The old ways are not always the best ways and with the sun moving through the most dynamic area of your chart you must be willing to experiment.

If you need to find a way out of some sort of commitment then Mercury’s change of sign today will no doubt give you some interesting ideas. But here’s a better idea: having made a promise, albeit a loose one, why not try keeping it?

What seems of massive importance to other people today will seem trivial in the extreme to you but if you are smart you will keep your opinion about it to yourself for the time being. They will come round to your way of thinking soon enough.
