You may want to believe that a friend or family member can do no wrong but the planets indicate they have in fact made a major error that needs to be dealt with. No one is perfect, not even you, so don’t be too hard on them.

Cosmic activity in the most adventurous area of your chart makes it easy to start something new but because mind planet Mercury is going through its retrograde phase you must plan carefully every step of the way. Be daring but don’t be reckless.

It would appear that someone is trying to keep you in the dark about a situation you want to know more about. You have every right to dig deeper and find out what is going on but there is no guarantee you will be delighted by what you find.

You seem to be flavour of the month at the moment and long may that happy situation continue, but don’t fall into the trap of thinking you can do as you please without fear of the consequences. Others people’s goodwill is unlikely to be limited.

A new friendship, or maybe even a new romance, will light up your life over the next 12 months and the pleasure you get from it will have a knock-on effect on your working relationships as well. Treat people well and they will treat you even better.

If a friend asks you for a favour this weekend you will of course help them out but don’t let them depend on you to such an extent that you have no time left to do your own thing. Be brutal and insist they do more for themselves.

Although a friend or relative appears to be on their best behaviour at the moment the planets warn they may be up to something they don’t want you to know about, so be on your guard and, if possible, find out what’s cooking.

According to the planets you have been deceiving yourself about how much effort you are going to have to put in to make a success of a new creative project. You cannot approach it in a half-hearted manner – it really is all or nothing.

You have been pushing yourself extremely hard of late and if you don’t slow down and give your body and mind a break this weekend it will take a lot longer to recover later on. You have limits like everyone else, so be smart and respect them.

The sun in your sign makes a challenging link to Saturn this weekend, so don’t expect everything in your life to run smoothly over the next 48 hours. When confronted by obstacles you must use your brain, as brute force won’t be enough to get past them.

You may be on the verge of giving up on a problem you have been struggling with for ages but don’t be hasty. Put it on the back-burner for a while and focus on more enjoyable things. The answer will pop into your head early next week.

If it seems as if everyone is talking about you at the moment it’s most likely because they are. What have you done to provoke so much gossip? Who knows, but now you have got their attention make sure they know you are serious about your intentions.

Don’t let it worry you if someone else’s misfortune works in your favor this weekend. It isn’t your fault they got themselves in such a muddle and it would be foolish of you not to take advantage of it – as they would if the roles were reversed.

You demand freedom of action for yourself and what happens this weekend will remind you that friends and family members are entitled to their liberty every bit as much as you are. Encourage them to go off and do their own thing for a while.

You may be tempted to try and hold back the tide of events but what’s the point? The world is changing at a rate of knots and there is no way you will be able to slow it down, let alone stop it. Try changing with it instead.

If a friend or family member tries to warn you about something this weekend you would be a fool to ignore them. They can see pitfalls that you, in your desire to believe that nothing can go wrong, have managed to overlook. Listen, learn and act.

Saturn in your sign urges you to knuckle down and do what is expected of you on the work front, but don’t push yourself too hard. You have responsibilities, to be sure, but you also have rights, including the right not to exhaust yourself.

Saturn’s influence on your birthday is such that both rewards and penalties will be magnified many times over, so always follow the rules and always make sure the people you work with are following them too. Honesty plus hard work will bring lasting success.

Your insights into what makes a friend or loved one tick will come in useful today as you should be able to predict what their next move is going to be. You will also be well placed to step in and rescue them if they get it wrong.

Do you cash in some kind of investment now or do you hang on to it a bit longer in the hope that it will appreciate in value even more? Only you can make that decision but the planets warn you may have pushed your luck far enough already.

You may not see eye-to-eye with a friend or family member over every little thing but your aims are still generally in alignment, so strive to stay on good terms. Remember, their way of doing things is as valid for them as your way is for you.

It’s quite likely that you will get a bit emotional over the next few days as cosmic activity in the most sensitive area of your chart comes to a head. But that’s okay – in fact it’s good, as it helps to let off steam once in a while.

The fact that you enjoy being the centre of attention will work in your favour today as all eyes will be on you rather than on someone you are trying to protect. Don’t do anything too outrageous though or they may see through your act.

Upheavals on the career front are likely today but there is no need to be alarmed. The fact that there are so many things up in their air at the moment will work in your favour as you adapt quicker than most people to new opportunities.

Not everyone will be happy with the events of the next few days but you will be delighted in that you have been bored with a lack of movement in recent weeks and can take advantage of the chaos and confusion to get your life moving again.

If you find yourself torn between two equally attractive offers today choose the one that helps other people more than it helps you. Not only will you feel good about yourself but in the long-term the universe will reward you for your generosity of spirit.

Mars and Jupiter in your opposite sign will bring some serious tensions to the surface over the next few days and you can and you must deal with them so they never bother you again. Be ruthless if you have to – this is no time for sentiment.

The next few days are going to be super busy, so let loved ones know that you won’t be able to devote your full attention to them but that you will make it up to them later on. They’ll understand – they know how much your work means to you.

Cosmic activity in the most creative area of your chart urges you to get serious about a long-term project. Up until today you have been just tinkering with it but now you must knuckle down and get it finished. It’s your big chance to shine.

Do what you can to bring a smile to the face of a loved one who is feeling a bit down in the dumps. As a Water sign you have a knack for highlighting the absurdities of life and in doing so can help people feel better about themselves.

Resist the temptation to go for short-term gains when the long-term rewards could be so much better. That applies in particular to anything of an artistic nature – create something that lasts rather than something that brings instant but temporary gratification.

No matter how much your rivals may try to intimidate you today if you refuse to get angry there is nothing they can do about it. Ignore the threats they make and carry on as before. Your friends and allies are far more important than your enemies.

There are times when it is sensible to let others take the lead and this is one of them. What occurs over the next few days will transform your current situation to such an extent that there is no sense trying to exert too much control.

The message of the stars today is that you need to pay attention to what is going on in the world around you. If you ignore something that seems to be of minor importance you may find out later on that it was actually hugely significant.

Things are going so well for you at the moment that you may start believing there is some sort of catch. The good news is there’s absolutely no need to worry – there is no downside to your current run of good fortune, so enjoy every moment of it.

If you try to force a colleague to do your bidding today you could stir up a lot of resentment. Whatever it is you are trying to accomplish it is more likely to be a success if you focus mostly on other people’s needs. What’s in it for them?

Be honest about what you’ve been up to in recent weeks and then let friends and family know what you are going to be doing next. If they are kept in the loop as to your ambitions they are less likely to try to stand in your way.

Big opportunities are heading your way and the planets suggest if you keep your eyes and ears open and then act quickly and decisively you could make a fortune. At the very least you will impress people whose support could be priceless.

You will find yourself in a situation that calls into question your notions of what is right and what is wrong. It’s never easy for someone so set in their ways to see things from the other person’s point of view but it will pay you to try.

Your confidence may take a bit of a dive over the next day or two but nothing much will come of it, so keep telling yourself that while your mood may be on the down slope now it will be soaring again by the end of the week.

Someone whose outlook on life is the opposite of your own will rub you up the wrong way today but it is entirely in your own power to either react to their provocations or to ignore them. What can they do to actually hurt you? Nothing at all.

You don’t have to follow a script that has been drawn up by other people. You have a mind of your own and are perfectly at liberty to take a completely different path through life if you so choose. You know what is best for yourself.

When are you going to get serious and make that big dream of yours a reality? Your birthday chart indicates that the next 12 months could be make or break, so commit yourself to your vision 100 per cent and write your name in the stars.

Make a point of doing something different over the next 24 hours, something that reminds those around you that you should never be taken for granted. If you break a few rules or shatter a few taboos along the way so much the better!

If you want to get on top of your workload today you will have to start at the crack of dawn and labour through until after the sun has gone down. If you put in a serious effort now the rest of the week should be easygoing.

With Mars and Jupiter joining forces in your birth sign today nothing and no one can stand in your way – you are an irresistible force and there is not an immovable object in sight. Get moving and don’t stop until you have reached your goal.

It may be true that someone is talking behind your back but what of it? It’s only words and words can only hurt you if you allow them to. Besides, friends and work colleagues are unlikely to be taken in by a rival’s obvious lies.

The current cosmic picture is geared to getting things done as part of a team and if you are willing to put your ego aside today there is no limit to what you can accomplish with like-minded people at your side – and it’s the winning side.

It is a sad fact of life that some people never seem to learn from their mistakes, but what occurs today will force a friend or relative to look at the world from a different angle and then start making changes. Help them make those changes if you can.

Time is not a factor as far as your aims and ambitions are concerned, so don’t put needless pressure on yourself by constantly looking at the clock. Decide what it is that needs to get done and then just do it regardless of the hour.

If a friend or loved one takes you into their confidence over the next 24 hours you must make sure you keep their secrets. If you accidentally let slip what they have told you it’s unlikely they will ever feel able to trust you again.

You may be tempted to cover up for a friend who has got themselves in a spot of trouble but the planets indicate it would be better for them in the long-term if you refuse to get involved. On this occasion let them sort it out for themselves.

Bear in mind today that not everyone is as mentally strong as you are and that some people crack more easily than others in pressure situations. On the work front especially you may have to step in and assist a colleague who is on the verge of panic.

A Mars-Jupiter union in the most dynamic area of your chart will endow you with endless energy and self-belief. Identify the goal that means the most to you and aim to reach it in hours and days rather than weeks and months. It CAN be done.

There could be a few disruptions today and friends and loved ones are likely to be touchy in the extreme. Promise yourself that no matter what they might say or do you won’t overreact. They don’t mean it and you don’t need to let it hurt you.

Mars and Jupiter join forces on your birthday in a way that encourages you to expand your outlook on life and get involved in wider world issues. A cause that is close to your heart will benefit from your outstanding leadership qualities.

You may get it into your head today that everything in your life needs to be torn down so you can start again from scratch, but that is completely wrong. By all means have a serious purge but why throw out what still seems to work?

Your thoughts will be all over the place today, so try not to make decisions that could have serious repercussions down the line if they go wrong. On the home front, especially, you are under no obligation to do what loved ones say is your duty.

While Mercury, your ruler, is moving retrograde it is of the utmost importance that you focus on the positive things in your life and refuse to give the negative things even a minimum of head space. Act as if you cannot lose, and you won’t.

Something you have kept secret for quite a while could become public knowledge today. There is no point trying to deny the fact that you made an error of judgement, so hold up your hand and own your mistake. It’s really not such a big deal.

Unexpected feelings of anxiety will plague you today and make you believe the world is against you. Keep telling yourself there is no evidence for that and even if the worst were to happen it would not put more than a minor dent in your ambitions.

You may be minded to make an issue of something on the work front but as communications planet Mercury, now in its retrograde phase, moves back into the career area of your chart today there isn’t much point – because no one will be listening.

Something you have wanted to own for a very long time is now within reach but you may have to wait a bit longer before you get your hands on it. Be patient and stay alert so you are ready to grab it when the opportunity finally arrives.

If a friend needs your assistance today you will of course do what you can, but you also need to be smart and recognize that just giving them money won’t solve their problems. Instead, give them the sort of practical advice they seem incapable of giving themselves.

A mix-up in communications could lead to a falling-out with a friend or colleague and it may be quite a while before you mend fences and get back together again. That could though be a blessing in that time spent apart will be good for both of you.

Don’t waste your time trying to get a colleague to see sense today because they are in one of those moods when whatever you say they will take the opposite viewpoint. If you have to push ahead with your plans on your own then so be it.

Mercury’s influence on your birthday is such that you will need to question every assumption that you usually feel comfortable with. If you start from the premise that the opposite of what you believe is closer to the truth then you won’t go far wrong.

You may be eager to push ahead with a project that means a lot to you but while your ruler Mars is at odds with Saturn you must be cautious. If you take too big a step forward today you may have to take several steps back later on.

You try to be sensitive to other people’s feelings but this is one of those occasions when it may be impossible not to tread on a few fragile egos. Say what needs to be said and don’t worry too much how other people choose to take it.

The facts may be all on your side but that won’t change the beliefs of people whose outlook on life is tainted by various conspiracy theories. Don’t waste time and energy challenging their incorrect viewpoints, because it’s highly unlikely they want to know.

As one of those zodiac’s cardinal signs your standards tend to be higher than most other people’s, so don’t be too disappointed today if a friend’s efforts fall short of the mark. Help them make a better go of it next time around.

The more daunting the tasks you face over the next few days the more you will enjoy yourself. You are in one of those moods when you take great delight in reminding friends and rivals alike that you are special, a maverick, a true one-off.

The time for excuses is over: you know what needs to be done and you know that if you begin now it won’t be long before it is successfully completed. The first step may be the hardest but it can also be the easiest if you start out small.

Take time out of your busy schedule to look ahead and envisage where you would most like to be a month or two from now. You won’t be able to start on your journey immediately but you can at least lay the groundwork for later on.

Do something that excites you today. Better still, make it something that shocks some of the people around you. It won’t take much to stir things up and it will do friends and family members good to know they can no longer take so much for granted.

Mars in your opposite sign is at odds with Saturn today, so you will need to tread carefully when dealing with loved ones and people in positions of power. Try not to be too severe when pointing out their faults. Better still, don’t point them out at all.

Although new ideas are pouring into your head at a rate of knots you cannot possibly make use of them all, so be selective with those you choose to build on. And remember, it’s only a truly good idea if it works for everyone.

No doubt you are tempted to tell friends and family members what they want to hear but deep down you know that protecting them from the truth is likely to be harmful in the long-term. Be honest with them today, no matter how much it stirs things up.

Saturn in your sign is at odds with Mars today, so don’t be surprised if you find yourself disagreeing with what loved ones and work colleagues are up to. It is not, however, your place to insist they change their ways. Let them make their own mistakes.

The bigger your ambitions this year the clearer you must be about how you are going to finance them. You may believe in yourself 100 per cent but others will need to be convinced if you expect them to back you with cold, hard cash.

Don’t waste your time complaining about other people’s behaviour this weekend because it won’t make any difference. Instead, save your breath and your energy and focus on a creative activity that makes you feel as if you are doing something positive in life.

Someone you socialize with will say controversial things for the fun of it this weekend and if you are smart you won’t take a word of it seriously. No matter how outrageous their claims may be don’t rise to the bait. Laugh at them instead.

A work-related issue is not as bad as you think it is, so stop worrying about it and focus instead on people and activities that make you happy. Your mind creates your reality, so be positive in thought and deed and don’t forget to smile!

You need to be careful with money over the next few days because both the approaching full moon and Mercury’s retrograde phase will make it all too easy to waste your resources on things you don’t need – and on people who do not deserve your generosity.

The sun in your sign at this time of year makes you eager to push ahead with your plans but other influences are likely to frustrate you over the next 48 hours. That’s okay. Just because the clock is ticking does not mean you have to hurry.

A half-hearted effort is better than no effort at all, so force yourself to at least get started on a chore of some kind this weekend. Once you get into a rhythm you may be surprised to discover that it’s not such a boring job after all.

Friends and loved ones could be rather demanding this weekend and there will be times when you are inclined to tell them to get off your back. A better response might be to say the words they want to hear and then do things your own way anyway.

Your enemies are few and your friends are many, so why are you so bothered about those who oppose you? The message of the stars today is that you need to lighten up a little. You don’t need to spend every last moment of your life on edge.

What a colleague or maybe even your employer tells you today will most likely annoy you but don’t get so uptight about it that you neglect to look ahead and see where this turn of events might lead. It could nudge you in a profitable new direction.

It may seem as if everyone but you knows what is going on at the moment but there is no need to panic. Partners, colleagues and loved ones are as much in the dark as you are, only they tend to disguise that fact better than you do!

If you rush around trying to get fifty things done at the same time today you will quickly wear yourself out. Instead, focus on the two or three aims that are of most importance to you and forget about the rest. No one expects you to be Superman!

Your head may be full of big ideas but can you be sure they are good ideas? Mercury’s retrograde phase means your mind may not be as sharp as you would like it to be, so maybe get a second opinion before embarking on anything new.

Each birthday is a milestone but you can sense that this anniversary is of special significance. If you make the most of your many opportunities over the coming year your life will be transformed in ways that seem miraculous. Make magic happen.

The most important thing as the new week begins is that you follow the letter of the law, whatever that law may be. Under no circumstances can you cut corners or break rules, because you simply won’t get away with it. Be honest at all times.

Today’s full moon occurs at one of the more challenging angles of your chart, so you cannot afford to go to extremes no matter what the provocation might be. Whatever happens, at home or at work, you must stay in control of your emotions.

It may be annoying that your movements have been restricted over the past few days but there is nothing you can do about it so there is no point complaining. Once the current full moon begins to fade in midweek your options will improve.

If you are thinking about investing some of your hard-earned cash in an investment opportunity of some kind you are strongly advised to think again. The full moon cuts across the financial axis of your chart, so play safe, at least for now.

Today’s full moon will bring a partnership matter to a head but that’s a good thing because it means you will have to resolve it once and for all. Don’t let your emotions play any part in what you decide – a rational approach is an absolute must.

At some stage over the next 24 hours you will have no option but to request assistance from people who are more in tune with what is going on at your place of work. If you speak up and call in some favours you should get through okay.

You have been on a lucky streak of late but that streak may be coming to an end, so get serious about your obligations and don’t just assume that everything will turn out for the best. Above all, avoid the kind of impulsive actions you too often enjoy.

No matter what happens today you must keep your composure, even though that may be difficult at times. There is nothing to be gained, and a lot to be lost, by losing your temper with people whose attitude rubs you up the wrong way.

If you act on the assumption that travel arrangements may be subject to last minute delays you are less likely to get angry when plans have to change. Don’t worry about being late, just make sure you get to your destination in the right frame of mind.

What happens today may come as a shock but if you think about it a bit you will have to admit that the signs were there and you should have seen it coming. Fortunately, it will look more of a big deal than it actually is.

Focus on what is real and refuse to let fears and fancies get the better of you. As today’s full moon takes place in your birth sign there could be occasions when your rational mind is too easily overpowered by other people’s emotional negativity.

What you hear today may not be music to your ears but it’s not the end of the world either, so don’t overreact. If you can recognize that some people are getting distraught for no good reason you can have a few laughs at their expense.

Not only is there a full moon on your birthday but Mercury’s influence will affect you as well, so promise yourself now that you will take an upbeat attitude to everything that occurs. Think happy and you will be happy – it’s as simple as that.

If you attempt to push loved ones in directions they don’t want to go they will dig in their heels and refuse to move. The way to win them round to your way of thinking is to inspire them with a vision of a great future together.

The fact that you have received no thanks at all for helping someone in need must not be allowed to cloud your thinking or change your approach. You did not put yourself out to earn applause, you did it because it was the right thing to do.

There are downsides to your current celebrity status and one of them is that people are watching you wherever you go and whatever you do. Make an effort to duck out of the limelight today, so you can act with a little more freedom.

Do you have a philosophy of life? If not, you would be wise to start thinking about what drives you and how you can use that drive to help make the world a better place. Put aside some time today to meditate on the meaning of life.

The sun is coming to the end of its stay in your sign but that does not mean you should slow down or abandon what you are working on. In fact the opposite is true: make a superhuman effort to finish that important project you recently started.

By all means go your own way and do your own thing today but don’t go overboard and start behaving outrageously as that will inevitably turn people against you. You will have a lot more freedom to act when the sun enters your sign on Thursday.

Some kind of creative endeavour needs to be completed before the sun changes signs on the 22nd. After that date you will have a lot less room for manoeuvre and certainly won’t be able to do as you please. A great many people are depending on you.

If you keep pushing at a door that has been shut to you in the past it will eventually swing wide open. The cosmic picture is changing and in a matter of days you could find yourself on the brink of a major breakthrough. Be ready for it.

Even people who have known you for years seem determined to misunderstand what you are telling them. It may be frustrating but it isn’t the end of the world, so stay calm and wait until their brain fog has passed, because that’s all it is.

A financial issue of some kind needs to be dealt with before the sun changes signs on Thursday. You may not be worrying about it now but you will certainly be worrying about it later on when you incur losses that could have been avoided.

You may be an ideas person by nature but you need to accept that other people’s minds don’t always work along the same mental grooves as your own. Partners and colleagues are entitled to disagree with you and you must not take it personally.

If you use your imagination today you can easily conjure up an image of where you would most like to be and what you would most like to be doing before the end of the year. Hold that vision in your head and work toward a major transformation.

Because you have such a big personality you attract people who feed off your confidence and life force. This year though you would be wise to limit how much you give of yourself, so you have enough left in the tank to fuel your own ambitions.

There are a number of practical problems to be dealt with and you must approach them in the right frame of mind. Do what has to be done and don’t let anyone, not even loved ones, persuade you to pull your punches. This is no time for sentiment.

You’ve done plenty for other people in recent weeks, so now do something for yourself. With the sun about to move into the most dynamic area of your chart you cannot allow emotional commitments to hold you back. Go for it 100 per cent.

Don’t be surprised if you get a bit tearful at times over the next 24 hours. You’re not cracking up but you are feeling the effects of the mental and emotional strain you have been under of late. Have a good cry if it makes you feel better.

There haven’t been too many opportunities to relax of late but when the sun moves into the most social area of your chart tomorrow you should find it easier to let your hair down. Put fears and worries out of your mind and just have fun!

You have been buzzing around non-stop in recent weeks but not even a Leo can keep up this level of activity forever. Give yourself permission to wind down a bit over the next few days. Let other people do the running around for a change.

A new solar year is about to begin and it won’t be long before the smile that has been missing from your face is back to stay. On a practical level the most important thing now is that you focus on one aim at a time. Less is more.

You may think you can get your way through sheer force of personality but as from tomorrow that won’t be so easy. As the sun moves into the most sensitive area of your chart you will accomplish more if you try to be a touch less intimidating.

You may seem imperious and hugely self-confident to the world at large but deep down you have fears and doubts like everyone else and some of them will come to the surface today. Don’t let them hold you back. Your prospects are exceedingly good.

Life has been tough of late but conditions should get easier not long after the sun changes signs tomorrow, so stop acting as if there is a nasty surprise around every corner and start believing that only good things will occur – and they will.

You are not usually affected by jealousy but there may be moments today when you wish that someone paid you as much attention as they have been paying someone else. Could they have been doing so deliberately to see what effect it has on you?

The sun’s move into the partnership area of your chart tomorrow will make it easy for you to reach out to other people. Decide what it is you need from them, then make your request in a confident but respectful manner. They are unlikely to refuse.

Neptune’s influence on your birthday means you will need to be on top of your game when negotiating financial matters. You may want to think the best of the people you deal with but can you afford to take the chance? No you cannot.

You would be wise to leave nothing to chance today, especially on the work front where even a minor mistake could lead to major repercussions. This most definitely isn’t one of those times when you can afford to play things by ear.

You can sense that something special is approaching but you cannot work out what it might be. No matter: just sit back, relax and let life come to you. With the sun on your side over the next few weeks you have nothing to worry about.

You may be tempted to hunker down and pretend that the world outside your door does not exist but that is the worst possible approach you could take. Whatever challenges might be coming your way you must be brave and face up to them.

Your mind will be full of good ideas over the next few days and one of those ideas may even be a great idea. Listen carefully to what your intuition tells you and be prepared to back it 100 per cent no matter what the doubters say.

Although the sun leaves your sign today there is no need to feel sad. On the contrary, you have achieved so much over the past few weeks that you should be giving yourself a pat on the back. And there is still so much more you can do.

No doubt there were times of late when it seemed as if the whole world was conspiring against you but with the sun moving into your sign today your outlook on life will be much more positive. Live in the present and plan for the future.

There is no point feeling guilty about something that was not remotely your fault. Maybe you believe you could have done more, and maybe you could, but you are not superhuman and cannot solve everyone’s problems. Focus on your own issues today.

How much progress you make over the next few weeks depends in large part on how successful you are in winning people round to your way of thinking. Don’t hit them over the head with a deluge of facts and figures – turn on the charm instead.

Pursue objectives that mean something to you personally and don’t waste your time on people whose aims are at odds with your own. If they get the impression that you can be easily manipulated they won’t leave you alone for a single moment.

The more you have been held back in the past by friends and colleagues who don’t share your vision the more opportunities there will be to go after your dreams now. A more adventurous phase is beginning, so don’t be afraid to take a few chances.

The planets are encouraging you to focus on financial matters between now and the end of the week, because if you feel good about your money situation you will feel good about personal and professional relationships as well. Aim to be rich.

As the sun is now moving into your opposite sign it’s possible that some people may start to throw their weight around a bit. If friends and colleagues make unreasonable demands you can and you must stand up for yourself. It’s okay to say “No”.

You will encounter a number of powerful people over the coming year and some of them may be difficult to deal with. The more they try to push you in one direction the more you should ignore them and follow your own favored path. They can’t hurt you.

You have never been the sort to back away from confrontation and you are not about to start now. Think tough and act tough over the next 24 hours even though you may not feel at your best physically. You can be a pretty good actor at times.

By all means stand up for your beliefs today but don’t start arguments just for the fun of it. It’s one thing to take a minority view on something but it’s not a good idea to make out that everyone who does not agree with you is stupid.

You will come under pressure on the work front today but that’s a good thing in that it will force you to get your act together and stop coasting on charm alone. Whatever the challenge may be you have what it takes to get past it.

Either everything will go right for you today or nothing will go right, there is no middle ground. Hopefully you will be on the winning side but, if not, don’t take your defeats too seriously – there is still tomorrow and the day after that.

It may be frustrating that you have to deal with a situation you have been through a dozen times before but some people are incapable of learning even the easiest of lessons, so point out to them what they are doing wrong, then get them to do it correctly.

If a rival says something today that is clearly untrue you must pounce on their error and let people in positions of authority know that you at least are on the ball. Is it wrong to take advantage of other people’s mistakes? Of course not!

Don’t let it worry you if something you have been working on diligently for the past few weeks has to be put aside for a while. There is something else that must be dealt with first and your original venture won’t suffer because it has to wait.

An unexpected delay may be frustrating but it’s not the end of the world so don’t get upset about it. Use the extra time you’ve been given to go over the details of what you are working on and make sure you’ve left nothing to chance.

You enjoy a good story but what a colleague tells you today is so obviously a fiction that it will amuse you to think they actually believe it. Don’t bother trying to explain it to them though, they have too much invested in it being true.

You may not be in the mood for conversation but a friend clearly needs someone to talk to, so make yourself available and at least pretend to be interested in what they have to say. The advice you end up giving them will put their mind at rest.

You need to focus less on money and possessions and more on personal relationships. Your cashflow situation may be far from happy but a loved one’s happiness is what matters now, so do whatever it takes to get them smiling again.

You enjoy discussing social and political issues but what starts as an amicable exchange of views could quickly degenerate into a shouting match. Now that you are aware of that you can tone things down a bit. What does anger resolve? Nothing at all.

Venus in the money area of your chart is linked to Jupiter on your birthday, so you would be wise to limit your spending to things that you genuinely need. You won’t have to go without luxuries completely but you will need to control your tendency to overindulge!

If you put a name to your desires today and over the weekend friends and loved ones will go out of their way to make them happen for you. Even if your requests are on the outrageous side they will see to your needs with no questions asked.

The message of the stars today is that you must treat other people the way you would like them to treat you. It won’t always be easy considering some of the stupid things they get up to, so make a conscious decision not to be judgmental.

The thrill of doing something that more conservative types will disapprove of will be too much to resist today, but don’t push your luck too far. How thrilling do you think it will be if people in positions of power decide to make an example of you?

You may think you have enough cash in your pocket to splash out on a long list of luxury items but the planets warn there could be some major expenses coming up that you had not budgeted for, so make sure you keep enough in reserve.

The more colleagues try to impress on you how important it is to stick to tried and trusted ways of doing things the more determined you will be to take a different route. If routine matters bore you – and they do – then give them a miss.

You may be one of the more practical members of the zodiac but that does not mean you cannot be a free thinker as well, and what you are working on will certainly require a more innovative approach. Surprise people with your offbeat attitude.

You are so full of confidence at the moment that you don’t care who falls out if you rock the boat. What you should care about though is how easily your actions could turn would-be allies into long-term enemies. Try not to be quite so provocative.

Authority figures have been looking favourably on you of late, so much so that you have been allowed to get away with things that previously you would have been criticized for. Don’t push your luck too far though. There are always limits.

You don’t have to ask anyone’s permission if you want to get away for a while – just pack a bag and hit the road. The more some people say it’s too risky to leave the safety of home the more determined you will be to visit faraway places.

A clash of egos is coming to the boil and while it may not be pretty it will at least clear away the bad blood. Some people act as if they must always have at least one “enemy” on the go, but you don’t have to think like that.

Reach out to a friend or loved one today and let them know how much you care. Sometimes you take it too much for granted that other people are aware that you appreciate their efforts, but they cannot read minds, so spell it out for them.

You have allowed other people’s behaviour to rile you to such an extent that you feel it is your duty to say something about it. Maybe it is and maybe it isn’t but your words are unlikely to have much effect. Seriously, why waste your breath?

If you can steer clear of petty distractions over the coming year there is every possibility that you will accomplish something not just good but great. Learn to switch off from other people’s voices and listen instead to the voice that comes from within.

There will be a lot going on this weekend and you may find it hard to get your head around it all. But don’t let that worry you. The upheavals you experience now will make life much easier over the next few months, so embrace them.

Someone who has been trying to undermine your authority needs to be informed that you are wise to their mischief-making and won’t put up with it. If you stay calm and refuse to be provoked there is nothing they can do to harm you.

For some time now you have been feeling guilty about something that was not your fault and it’s time to get over it and move on. As Pluto ends its retrograde phase this weekend you no longer need to feel remorseful about what you did in the past.

What occurs this weekend will remind you that everything balances out in the end. You may have forgotten that in recent months as events outside your control made life difficult but now at last some seriously good luck is heading your way.

If you are not completely on top of your workload then you must make an extra special effort to get back on schedule this weekend. You need to get past that nagging and annoying feeling that so many important tasks still need to be done.

As from today you should find it easier to be assertive both at home and at work and get things moving in a positive direction. But don’t go to extremes and insist that colleagues and loved ones follow your every demand. Ask and it will be done.

The most important thing now is that you focus on the good things in life and make believe that the bad things do not exist. That may seem silly to begin with but ultimately your thoughts will create a better reality, both for yourself and for other people.

The mood with which you choose to greet the day will be the mood that stays with you for the coming week, so if you wake up feeling grumpy just force yourself to smile and act as if the world is a wonderful place, and it will be.

You have felt that you’ve been moving in the opposite direction to everyone else for quite some time but it will soon be clear you have in fact been moving toward the same goal. What do you need to change to be happy? Nothing at all!

You need to get past the belief that there are shadowy forces working behind the scenes to make life difficult for you. It may be true that not everyone is on your side but the few who are against you don’t have the power to disrupt your plans.

The message of the stars this weekend is that you must check everything that other people tell you, even if those doing the telling are people you know you can trust. The less you take for granted the more likely it is you’ll be safe.

Pluto’s influence on your birthday will encourage you to be more dynamic in your dealings with the world. It will also encourage you to help loved ones find solutions to problems they have been struggling with for too long. Be creative in your thinking.

You may be the only one who does not know what is going on but that could in fact work in your favour. When other people’s plans inevitably go wrong this week you will be able to truthfully say it was nothing to do with you.

You clearly have what it takes to succeed, so why are you so unsure of yourself? Most likely it’s because Jupiter, planet of good fortune, is now moving retrograde. Don’t worry. Success may take a little longer to reach you but it will come eventually.

The most important thing now is that you don’t let other people undermine your confidence. Keep telling yourself that what you are involved in is not a zero-sum game – everyone can be a winner over the next few days if you all pull together.

Usually your instincts can be trusted but the current cosmic climate means it might be wise to get a second opinion from someone who has more experience. At the very least they can point out some of the likely pitfalls along the way.

If someone in a position of authority tries to persuade you to do as they say you must dig in your heels and refuse to budge. With the power they have it won’t be easy but if you do give in now you will surely regret it later on.

Mars in your fellow water sign of Cancer makes you more adventurous than usual but other influences warn you would be wise to be cautious as the new week begins. Pace yourself sensibly and don’t agree to take on more than you can handle.

The more a rival talks today the more you will understand they don’t have the faintest idea what it is they are saying. Next to their loud and aggressive manner your own pronouncements will sound like quiet and confident words of wisdom.

If someone you usually get along with seems less than sociable today it’s not because of anything you may have said or done. Most likely they are just a little disappointed that their plans did not work out. Urge them to get over it and try again.

You may be tempted to invest in a project you genuinely believe could be the next big thing but the planets warn it could easily go wrong. Only you can make a final decision – it’s your money after all – but err on the side of caution for now.

Mars and Jupiter are both active on your birthday, which means your optimism will be high and your objectives even higher. You must though have a sensible plan that will take you from where you are now to where you want to be without making silly mistakes.

If you allow others to lead the way today you will end up some place good. Hold back your ego and be a passenger for a while – it may come as a welcome relief that you don’t have to be the one calling the shots all the time.

What occurs over the next 24 hours may seem to be a random event but if you look at it in closer detail you will realize that it’s part of a much wider pattern. You will also realize that everything you say and do has a knock-on effect.

For months, maybe years, you have wanted to try your hand at some kind of artistic activity and it’s time to stop daydreaming and make it happen. The sun remains in the most creative area of your chart only until the 22nd, so be quick about it!

At some point today you are going to have to deal with someone whose emotions are getting the better of them. No matter what they might say or do you must stay calm and show them why tears and tantrums are never going to work.

You may honestly believe that your efforts are going to pay off in a very big way, and maybe they are, but don’t count your chickens before they are hatched. And certainly don’t make plans to spend the profits before the dollars are there in your hand.

You are very much at the centre of things at the moment and you must make the most of it. Make sure that employers and senior colleagues are aware of who you are and what you can do. Don’t be just another face in the crowd.

Some days it feels as if the whole world is against you, but a week or so from now that feeling will be turned on its head and it will feel as if the whole world is with you. Try not to be so extreme in your moods!
