You seem to be at a loss as to what your next move should be. Put the problem out of your mind and focus on activities that are simple and fun. If you think less and act more your inner self will find it easier to guide you.

The best way to change the world is to change your attitude toward it. Stop looking at what goes on around you in a negative light and have faith that it will all come good in the end. Focus on your own life and what makes you happy.

A problem of some kind won’t go away if you just ignore it. Be more like your opposite sign of Virgo and look for practical solutions to the many minor issues that make up the bigger problem. Small steps are better than no steps at all.

The best way to make progress over the coming year will be to take plenty of short breaks along the way. Every time that your enthusiasm begins to flag just down tools for a while and take a time out. You will come back more energized and engaged.

Tomorrow’s lunar eclipse in your sign will play havoc with your emotions and there is no telling what you might say or do. Come the weekend though you will have calmed down a bit and can start apologizing to those you have offended!

Because the upcoming eclipse falls in the most sensitive area of your chart you will want nothing more than to hide away from the world over the next few days. Don’t cut yourself off completely though, at least not from the people you love.

When you want something enough there is no power on Earth that can stop you from getting it, but the planets warn you could be wanting one particular thing so much that it won’t be good for you in the long term. Steer clear of excess.

You are in one of those moods when all things seem possible, but don’t start believing that you can get what you desire without working for it. Your goal may be right there in front of you but you still have to reach out and grasp it.

The dream you have been visualizing for so long is beginning to take shape and it won’t be long before it becomes a reality. You must though be patient and allow events to unfold at their own pace. The pushier you are the longer it will take.

Although you pretend to be confident you have secret fears like everyone else and what occurs over the next few days will magnify those fears to a considerable extent. By the weekend though you will realize they were mere phantoms of your mind.

You will have to deal with someone today who is every bit as stubborn as you are and the situation could get ugly if you both refuse to see sense. You do though share many things in common, so a compromise solution can and must be found.

You will have to do something you don’t much enjoy today but if you approach it in a positive frame of mind you may find it’s not so bad. You won’t admit that to others, of course, but there is really no need to be gloomy about it.

Forget about the traditional way of doing things and invent new ways to express your artistic potential. You also need to get away from the idea that everything you create has to be a masterpiece – just do your very best and be happy with that.

The more family, friends and colleagues try to guide you today the more you will resist their efforts at every turn. Later on you may recognize that they had your best interests at heart but you are simply not in the mood to be dictated to.

The approaching lunar eclipse could upset your travel plans in a big way, so stay calm and try not to get angry if you have to make last-minute changes. It may take you longer to get where you want to go but you’re still on the right track.

This is not a good time to take risks with your money, so resist the urge to splash out on luxury items and ignore people who try to tempt you with new investment opportunities. The upcoming eclipse is likely to magnify any losses you make.

Venus, your ruler, links with Neptune on your birthday, which means you need to adopt a more relaxed view of life and its troubles. Accept everything that comes your way over the next 12 months with a smile, then teach others how to smile as well.

As today’s lunar eclipse takes place in your sign you must guard against self-pity and emotionalism. If you start feeling sorry for yourself it will warp your ability to think straight, so remind yourself of the many things you still have to be thankful for.

If you have to come down hard on a friend who has been taking liberties today you must not feel bad about it. It’s their fault they are in this position and they need to be forcefully reminded that you are not someone who can be taken advantage of.

Your head may be full of wonderful ideas at the moment but how many of them are practical? Today’s lunar eclipse will encourage you to believe that the impossible can be made to happen if you put in enough effort – but it isn’t true.

You must be honest with friends and colleagues about what you intend to do and whether or not they figure in your plans. Sometimes you have to be brutal and this is one of those occasions when your feelings cannot be allowed to dictate your choices.

If you hear conflicting reports as to what’s been going on both at home and at work you must close your ears to it all and refuse to believe one side or the other. Come the weekend the situation will be a lot clearer, so wait until then.

The line between fantasy and reality may wear a bit thin over the next 24 hours, so make sure what you are doing is guided by common sense rather than wishful thinking. It’s good that you know how to dream but don’t take them too seriously.

Someone you interact with on a day-to-day basis has been causing you some trouble of late and now you must decide what to do about it. Do you cut them off completely or do you give them a final warning? Only you can decide.

You may think that by staying in the background you can avoid disputes and disagreements but sooner or later you are going to have to choose sides. Watch carefully how other people behave today and give your support to the side that seems stronger.

There is no point getting angry with a friend or colleague who thinks and acts in second gear because they are incapable of going any faster. If you believe they are slowing you down then it might be better to push ahead on your own.

As today’s lunar eclipse cuts across important angles of your chart you need to be aware that everything you say and do is going to have a knock-on effect. So make sure what you say and do is positive and pleasant and benefits everyone.

There is no point fighting events over which you have no control. Just accept what comes your way and adapt yourself to it as best you can. Let the world see you are not as fixed in your outlook as some people say you are.

Venus, planet of harmony, moves into the career area of your chart today, making it easier to reach out to employers and colleagues. However, you would be wise to avoid negotiations of a financial nature until early next week. You’ll get a better deal then.

Although the lunar eclipse on your birthday suggests there will be conflicts of one kind or another, your ruling planet Venus will help you find the soothing words that can smooth things over. If you can make criticism sound like praise then you’ve got it made.

If you are serious about turning your ideas into realities then you must stop wasting time on people and activities that distract you from pursuing your goals. Yes, if you can imagine it you can do it, but you still need to manage your time wisely.

You are more sensitive than most people realize and yesterday’s eclipse is likely to have left you feeling a bit fragile. Give yourself time to rest today and then make the most of the weekend, by which time you should be back to your best.

Because you get bored easily you find it hard to focus on one thing at a time, and that’s okay, but if you chase after too many goals it is inevitable that your efforts will fall short of the mark. Limit yourself to just two objectives today.

The best way to approach a work-related problem is to pretend that it is no problem at all. Yesterday’s eclipse may have shaken things up a bit but as the dust settles you will realize that things are still pretty much the same as they were before.

If you give your imagination permission to roam you will come up with some really good ideas today, and one idea in particular could be a real money-spinner if you are prepared to get serious about it. Think long-term but act immediately.

If something good happens today, and almost certainly it will, don’t waste time trying to work out why you have been so fortunate. If Lady Luck makes an effort to smile on you the least you can do is make an effort to enjoy it.

What a friend or loved one suggests you do together today may not inspire you much but if you are smart you will do it anyway. Yesterday’s lunar eclipse may have upset one-to-one relationships a bit but it won’t take much to heal the wounds.

The planets are urging you to commit yourself to a cause or movement that you feel passionate about. Don’t just stand on the sidelines making negative comments – get directly involved and be one of the few who make a difference in the world.

Make a serious effort to understand something that up until now has left you baffled. Once one bit of the puzzle makes sense it won’t be long before you are able to join the dots and see the bigger picture – and it’s a very nice picture indeed.

Avoid getting caught up in a dispute that has nothing to do with you. The planets warn if you show favouritism to one side and not the other you risk getting dragged in deeper. Far better to keep your distance and favour no one but yourself.

Let go of your money worries and act on the assumption that you will always have enough to pay the bills. Yes, your cashflow situation could be better but compared to most people you are rich in the things that truly matter, especially love.

Your mind is a powerful tool and what you think about now will become your reality later on, so make sure all your thoughts are both pleasant and positive. If you can do that then in a matter of days your situation will change for the better.

An issue that never bothered you much in the past will become more important to you over the coming 12 months. As you get more involved you will meet people who share your values and together you can create a community that changes the world.

Whatever promises you may have made to partners and loved ones over the past few weeks you must make sure you can deliver on them over the next few days. If you keep delaying things they may start believing those promises were always empty.

You may not be as free to come and go as you would like this weekend but maybe that’s a good thing. There are a number of loose ends that still need to be wrapped up, so focus on those and reward yourself for it later on.

Keep things simple and don’t let others persuade you to get involved in activities that, from your point of view, are utterly meaningless. Make use of the sun’s last few days in the most dynamic area of your chart to focus on what matters to you.

Mars in your sign endows you with confidence and courage and you must use it this weekend to make sure you get your way in one-to-one situations. You don’t have to be overly aggressive but you do have to be assertive. Make your will known.

Don’t ask questions that you fear will throw up answers you probably won’t like. This is one of those occasions when you will be happier if you are kept in the dark about the whys and wherefores about what’s going on. Ignorance can be bliss.

The pace of life will increase considerably over the next 48 hours, so don’t take on more work than you can comfortably handle. That applies to your social life as well – you are under no obligation to be the life and soul of the party.

The past few weeks have brought many changes, most of which worked in your favour. The sun may be coming to the end of its journey through your sign but there is still time to do something special, something you can look back on with pride.

If you get the chance to slow down and catch your breath this weekend you must take it, because next week will bring new challenges and new opportunities and you will want to be ready for them both physically and mentally. Take a well-deserved break.

Set aside some time to think about the way your life is going and what changes you need to make in the future. Lock the door, draw the curtains and get in touch with the deepest part of your mind, the part that knows all the answers.

There have been some bruising encounters over the past few weeks and while you no doubt won more often than you lost you need to remind yourself that you don’t have to fight over everything. Co-operation will work better for you this weekend.

Put on a good show this weekend because the eyes of the world will be on you. The best way to make an impression is to be yourself and let employers and colleagues see that no matter what challenges arise you have the confidence to tackle them all.

You may be inclined to take a risk or two this weekend but if you are smart you will curb your enthusiasm and wait until the sun moves in your favour on Tuesday. Ignore those who say you should make your move now, because they are wrong.

What goes on behind the scenes over the coming year will affect you in unexpected ways, so stay loose and be ready to react to changes that come at you out of the blue. There will be opportunities to use those changes for your own financial benefit.

Don’t worry too much if someone in a position of authority tries to force you to do things you have no interest in, because their power over you is getting weaker by the minute. Stand up for yourself and let the world know you will not be intimidated.

As one of the zodiac’s fixed signs you rarely change your ways but because the sun moves into your opposite sign today you must recognize that this is one of those occasions when bending with the breeze is a must – and it won’t hurt a bit.

What others want to hear and what they need to hear are two very different things. Make it your business today to lay the facts in front of them so they don’t have the excuse later on that no one told them what their options were.

One of the very best times of the year begins for you today as the sun moves into the most dynamic area of your chart, but you must be sensible and pace yourself carefully over the next few days. Don’t be in such a rush to get things done.

Loved ones must be allowed to do things their own way today, even if you can see it will most likely end in tears. It is a sad fact of life that people tend to learn best when they make the kind of mistakes that can be easily avoided.

The sun moves into the most outgoing area of your chart today and almost immediately you will feel a great surge of energy and enthusiasm. By all means get out and about and have fun with your friends. If you’re not laughing then you’re not doing it right!

You may be a bit too aggressive today, especially on the home front where Pluto’s influence will encourage you to stir things up rather than calm them down. Be warned that if you go to extremes you can expect a backlash of some kind.

The sun moves into your sign today and a new solar year gets underway. Forget about everything that went before and focus on making the most of the opportunities that are right in front of you. Your future is bright and it starts right now.

You can, if you wish, try to act as a peacemaker in a dispute of some kind but the planets warn you probably won’t be successful. Sometimes the best course of action is to stand back and let others get on with their petty vendettas.

The sun’s move into the friendship area of your chart today will make it easy to get along with all kinds of people, so don’t limit yourself to interacting only with friends and family and neighbors. Reach out to everyone who crosses your path.

You will become increasingly ambitious over the next few days and if you play your cards right you could soon be moving up in the world. The best way to impress employers, senior colleagues and other important people is to act on your own initiative.

There has been a lot of disruption in your life of late and there could be more of the same over the next 24 hours, but after that will follow a period of relative calm. There are some really good things coming your way from over the horizon.

A sun-Pluto link on your birthday will endow you with the power to make things happen but you must use that power wisely. Whenever you are tempted to compete with someone stop to think for a minute and then choose to co-operate instead.

What others expect of you today may seem trivial and a waste of your precious time but if you knuckle down and make a good job of it you will get much better opportunities in the near future. Think of it as a test of your commitment.

If you feel you have reason to complain about the way you are being treated on the work front then you must speak up. With both the sun and Mercury moving through the partnership area of your chart your grievance will not go unnoted.

Just because someone wants to know your opinion about something does not mean you have permission to be hyper-critical. If they trust you enough to want your advice the least you can do is to be honest in a way that does not risk destroying their confidence.

If you have to deal with someone you don’t approve of today be smart and keep your personal feelings to yourself. It’s quite likely that they feel the same way about you as you do about them. You just have vastly different values.

The more others tell you that something cannot be done the more determined you will be to prove them wrong. There is nothing Leo enjoys more than a challenge, so get stuck in and show a doubting world what a real winner looks like.

Others will approach you as if you are someone special today and, of course, you will be suspicious of their motives. Do they have a deceitful reason for flattering you? Maybe, but more likely they genuinely believe that you are deserving of praise.

Don’t hesitate to say what you think today, even if you know that some people won’t like it. If you keep your thoughts to yourself then you will be partly to blame when something goes wrong – because you failed to speak up when you should have.

You may have been a bit timid in your dealings with other people in recent weeks but now that the sun is moving through your sign you will if anything go to the other extreme. You must stay calm though – ranting and raving won’t change a thing.

You don’t need anyone’s help to work out what is going on in your environment – your instincts as to what kind of people you are dealing with are as usual spot on. And if those same instincts tell you not to get involved then stay well clear.

If there is someone in your social sphere that you would like to know better then speak up and say Hello. It’s more than likely they want to make your acquaintance as well, so break the ice and make the first move – they’ll love you for it.

An offer that arrives out of the blue may be tempting but is it really the right thing for you? The planets warn if you commit yourself too soon you may regret it when you realize how much of your precious time you have to give up.

Everyone wants to be your friend now, which is nice, but because you have so many existing commitments you must be sensible and limit the amount of time you spend on social engagements. There will be plenty of time for fun and games later on.

Even if you are the sort of Scorpio who generally plays by the book you will accomplish more this year if you try something new. Listen to what your inner voice tells you and then just do it. If you think too much your creativity will suffer.

Although your money situation could be better you must not focus on that to the exclusion of everything else. There are numerous ways you can improve your quality of life that won’t cost you a cent, so cheer up because you have lots to look forward to.

Cosmic activity in your opposite sign of Scorpio means you must make a conscious effort to put yourself in other people’s shoes and see life from their perspective. Only then will you understand why they act in certain ways. It will make you more forgiving too.

A dispute that has been brewing for ages will come to a head between now and the weekend and that’s good because it must be dealt with once and for all. The moment the issue is out in the open it will be easier to find a long-term solution.

Cosmic activity in the most dynamic area of your chart makes this one of the best times of the year to get things done on both a personal and a professional level. Expect the best of yourself and expect the best of other people too.

There is no point getting angry with someone who is openly opposing your wishes. According to the planets they are making life difficult because they want you to overreact, but you’re too smart to fall for it. Stay calm and carry on.

Draw a line under the past and promise yourself that as from this day on you will no longer be held back by all that emotional baggage you have been carrying around. It won’t be easy, of course, but it’s a start you can build on.

Good news about your money situation will be arriving soon, so stop fretting about how you are going to pay the bills and adopt a more positive attitude. Remember, the universe always reflects back at you the thoughts and feelings you send out.

You won’t lack for energy over the next few days and if you channel it in creative directions your chances of success will go through the roof. This is potentially one of the best times of the year, so fear nothing and expect good things only.

Sometimes you can be too optimistic for your own good and today you could expect more of people than they are able to deliver. Make an effort to see friends and loved ones for who they are rather than who you would like them to be.

If you follow your instincts and don’t stop to question what you are doing then you should make significant progress between now and the weekend. Generally speaking, the less you think and the more you act the more successful you will be.

Because the focus is now on your career you can expect some interesting opportunities to come your way over the next few weeks. You don’t have to set off in a new direction but if you do the universe will help you make that break.

The sun in your fellow water sign of Scorpio will encourage you to be bold in the decisions you make. If you are dissatisfied with your lot in any way then now is the time to do something about it. Don’t just talk about making a change, do it!

Make an effort to get out and about this year, because the more people you meet the more you will attract opportunities to shine. There is a lot you can do on your own but ten times more you can do alongside people who share your ambitions.

The best way to deal with someone who takes themselves too seriously is to pop their egotistical bubble by making fun of them. Every time they say something pompous find a way to make a joke of it. They won’t leave you short of opportunities.

Wherever you go and whatever you do over the next 24 hours you will make your mark by staying calm no matter what the provocation might be. While others are running around like headless chickens you will be focusing on what needs to be done.

Jupiter in your sign means you could be on the verge of something big, but as the planet of good fortune is going through its retrograde phase you can take nothing for granted. Detailed planning may not be your favorite activity but it must be done.

If you act too quickly today you run the risk of making a bad call and having to go back to the beginning and start all over again. No matter how confident you may feel make sure you move ahead just a step at a time.

Not everyone shares your can-do attitude and someone of a more cautious nature will attempt to scupper your plans. They are unlikely to succeed but they may annoy you to such an extent that you end up snapping at them, and regretting it later on.

If you keep a cool head today there is no limit to what you can achieve. The only problem is that friends and colleagues may be so terrified of making a wrong move that they are incapable of helping you. All the more glory for you then.

Strive to be different today. Refuse to follow the herd. The fact that everyone else seems to be racing towards a single objective suggests they may have fallen for some kind of propaganda – and are heading for the edge of a cliff!

The sun in your sign means you no longer have to wait for life to come to you – it is now within your power to set the agenda and make good things happen. The more you are on the move today the more opportunities you will create.

Lower your guard a bit today and let partners and loved ones see your vulnerable side. As one of the zodiac’s fire signs you usually come across as super confident but you have doubts and fears like everyone else. You don’t have to deny them.

Sometimes you can be a bit too self-controlled and the message of the stars today is that you need to lighten up and focus on the amusing side of life. Under that frosty exterior lurks a stand-up comedian waiting for an opportunity to make people laugh.

Events move so fast in the modern world that few things stay the same for long, but if you are happy with your life the way it is then ignore those who say you need to make changes. Start a new trend today by moving at a slower pace.

You don’t need to ask anyone’s permission to have fun, not with the sun and Mars occupying the most positive areas of your chart. Decide what it is that will bring you most joy and then just do it. There is nothing anyone can do to stop you.

A more assertive approach in one-to-one relationships will serve you well over the coming year but don’t go too far. Friends, colleagues and loved ones will be impressed by your confident attitude but that doesn’t mean they will allow you to bully them.

You enjoy being at the centre of things but if you make too much of a noise this weekend you could attract the attention of someone it might be wiser to avoid. When dealing with people in positions of authority it pays to keep a low profile.

Because you have gone out of your way to help so many people in recent weeks they will now go out of their way to assist you. If there is something you desire then friends and colleagues will get it for you – all you have to do is ask.

You may be in one of those moods when you cannot be bothered to make much of an effort but that’s okay. The more you relax now the more energy you will have available to meet the challenges that come your way over the next few weeks.

The more you try to make sense of a confusing situation the more confusing it seems to get. Your best course of action is to just forget about it for a while and come back to it early next month, by which time it should make more sense.

If you cannot work out how to resolve a difficult situation then open your mouth and ask someone who does. There is no shame in admitting that you don’t know everything – even a Leo needs advice and a helping hand once in a while.

Try to avoid situations where you don’t have full control over what is going on. According to the planets not everyone you have dealings with can be trusted, so err on the side of caution and refuse to commit yourself to other people’s plans.

The influence of Venus in your chart makes this a good weekend for travelling and socializing. If you feel like getting away from the daily grind then just get up and go. The more you are on the move the more interesting people you will meet.

Focus on your long-term goals this weekend and don’t let people who have less serious aims distract you. If you allow your attention to wander, even for an hour or two, you could miss out on an opportunity to improve your financial position.

Venus in your sign is encouraging the more generous side of your nature to come to the fore. The more forgiving you are this weekend the more likely it is the universe will forgive your own transgressions, of which there may be more than a few!

Go out of your way to avoid unpleasant people and unpleasant situations over the next 48 hours. If others think you don’t have the stomach for a fight you can prove them wrong later on, but for now you must stay calm in heart and mind.

The more someone tries to persuade you to join their cause this weekend the more you must insist that you will remain uncommitted. It’s not that you don’t care about what’s going on, you just believe that your input won’t make any difference.

It may seem as if others are getting rewards and applause that by right should come to you but don’t make a fuss about it. You have never been the sort to chase after glory and there is no logical reason why you should change your ways now.

Give yourself permission to dream and don’t listen to those who say you have no hope of seeing your vision come true. When a Scorpio wants something enough they always find a way to get it, so ignore the naysayers and do something amazing this year.

Everyone has secrets – yes, even an open and straightforward Aries – and it seems there is something you are desperately trying to hide from family and friends. The planets warn you won’t be able to conceal it forever, so start thinking about how best to reveal it.

A partner or colleague will get on your nerves with their boastfulness today, but if you are smart you will grin and bear it. It’s inevitable that at some point they will say something that makes them look silly. Give them all the room they need.

You may be tempted to change something that has worked well for you in the past but is that such a wise idea? Sometimes you can be too restless for your own good and on this occasion it might be best to leave things as they are.

The approaching new moon will endow you with drive and determination but you need to have something positive to channel all that energy into. If you are not yet involved in something of a creative nature now would be a good time to make a start.

Cosmic activity in one of the more emotional areas of your chart suggests that some kind of disturbance is imminent. The good news is that once everyone has had their say and the air has been cleared you will all be friends again.

It does not matter if the whole wide world disagrees with your opinions you have no intention of going back on what you believe, and that’s good. Is it possible that you are right and everyone else is wrong? On this occasion yes it is!

If you come into money today you won’t be able to hold on to it for long – the urge to go on a spree will be far too strong. You may end up being short of cash later in the week but at least the taxman won’t get it!

You have no intention of settling for second best and anyone who tries to persuade you to tone down your ambitions won’t be a friend or a colleague much longer. As far as you are concerned there is no middle ground between success and failure.

Make sure you get out of bed in the best possible mood, because that is the outlook that will stay with you throughout the day and well into the night. Seriously, what have you got to be glum about? Compared to most people you’ve got it good!

It is of the utmost importance that you keep an open mind today, because you are about to be confronted by something that seems ridiculous but is in fact closer to the truth than most people imagine. There are still some real mysteries out there in the world.

Don’t listen to people who say you should lower your sights a little because what they really mean is they want you to lower your sights a lot. The fact is they are intimidated by your desire to get ahead in the world. Intimidate them even more today.

This may be a time of extremes but that does not mean you should be extreme in your own thoughts and actions. Take a more balanced view of what is going on in the world. Be the kind of person who makes a constructive difference.

As one of the zodiac’s water signs you are driven as much by your emotions as you are by logical thought and that’s a good thing. Only do what feels right to you on an inner level this year, even if it puts you at odds with the world.

If you need extra money in your pocket then you are going to have to come up with a way to earn more of the stuff. Failing that, you could have a major clear out of those possessions you no longer need. Sell it all online.

Resist the temptation to make a big deal of something that is really of only minor importance. What a friend or colleague said or did may have been annoying but it didn’t hurt you in any material way, so be an adult about it and let it go.

If someone criticizes you over the next 24 hours it is most likely because they are jealous of your success. The best way to deal with them is to ignore what they say and carry on doing what made them so envious of you in the first place.

This could be and should be a wonderful time for you, especially creatively and romantically, and if you can find a way to bring those two things together it might turn out to be the best time ever. The universe loves you because you’re a doer.

If you have to let someone know in plain and simple language why they are getting on your nerves then just say it and be done with it. You are under no obligation to suffer fools, especially those who think they know better than you.

You are so full of energy at the moment that you may be tempted to take on a dozen tasks at once – and could make a bad job of several of them. Cut back on your commitments and do just two or three things amazingly well.

You may have a lot going for you at the moment but you cannot afford to take anything for granted, especially on the work front where rivals could be plotting to bring you down a peg or two. Don’t make it easy for them by being too laidback.

If you focus all your energies in a single direction between now and the end of the week you are sure to accomplish something remarkable. Don’t rely too much on other people though. Some of your colleagues talk a better game than they play.

You may look calm on the outside but on the inside you are having doubts about some of the decisions you recently took. Don’t be so negative. They may not all have been great decisions but at least you did something, which is more than most people do.

There will have to be some give and take when dealing with people whose ideas about how to proceed, both on a personal level and at work, are radically at odds with your own. Sharpen up your negotiating skills because you are going to need them.

You have never been the sort to compromise on a point of principle and you are not about to start now, no matter how much pressure is brought to bear from above. Don’t worry about creating enemies – you still have plenty of friends in high places.

There is no point looking for traditional answers to problems that are so new that there may not even be a name for them yet. Even when you do come up with a solution don’t try to set it in stone – be super flexible at all times.

Mercury at odds with changes planet Uranus on your birthday means you must not fall for the latest fad or fashion. What worked well for you in the past can work just as well in the future. If others want to stick their necks out, that’s up to them.

Guilt is a useless emotion and the sooner you get over what is preying on your mind the better. The approaching new moon is likely to magnify whatever regret or remorse you may be feeling, so put it out of your head and move on.

Take the opportunity today to remind partners and loved ones how much they mean to you. No doubt they are aware of that already but it doesn’t hurt to labor the point once in a while. Let them know that you still think they are special.

You seem to be making much more work for yourself than is strictly necessary. No doubt you can make a better of job of most things than your colleagues but if you try to do it all you may end up running yourself into the ground. Get help.

The approaching new moon in the most dynamic area of your chart will make it easy for you to shine over the next 48 hours. If there is something of a creative or artistic nature you are working on, aim high and make it a masterpiece.

You could be somewhat emotional today but is that such a bad thing? Because you tend to be so upbeat about life it comes as a surprise to some people when you show your vulnerable side, but they need to know you’re as human as they are.

Travel and social activities are under excellent stars now and if you can find a way to combine the two over the next few days this could be one of the very best times of the year for you. Make it good for friends and loved ones too.

Tomorrow’s new moon in the financial area of your chart will encourage you to make some necessary cuts in your spending. You enjoy splashing out, and there is nothing wrong with that, but don’t let your expenses get too far ahead of your income.

This is the perfect time for a possessions clear-out. If you are typical of your sign you don’t like to get rid of things you suspect that you may need one day but the new moon means it’s time to make some creative space in your life.

You may be smart enough to know that you have wandered out of your depth and need to get back to safer ground but are you smart enough to know you won’t be able to do that on your own? Getting assistance is not a sign of weakness.

The message of the planets today is that you must not try to force your opinions on other people. You are entitled to your point of view, of course, but they are every bit as entitled to take a different viewpoint. There’s no reason to take it personally.

If you want something enough between now and the weekend you will find a way to get it, but the planets warn there is a danger you could turn some people against you by your take-no-prisoners tactics. Act fairly so your rivals respect you.

The upcoming new moon will open your eyes to new possibilities and if you are brave enough to act on what you see there is no limit to what you can achieve. Proceed on the assumption that all things are permissible and all things are possible.

You may be a serious person by nature but your No. 1 aim for the coming year must be to laugh more. Life is an adventure and like all adventures it has its ups and downs. Learn what you can from the downs but focus mainly on the ups.

If you start something of a business or financial nature under the influence of today’s new moon it is sure to go well. Some people may say you are taking too much of a risk but you have faith in your instincts for making a profit.

You may believe that a friend or colleague is up to no good but the planets indicate you are probably seeing things that are not really there. If you give them the benefit of the doubt today it could be you who benefits in unexpected ways.

You must pace yourself sensibly over the next 24 hours because there are limits to your energy and stamina and you are nearing those limits right now. Find creative ways to lessen your load. For starters, get others to do more of the work.

If you want something enough today you will find a way to get it. A new moon in your fellow water sign of Scorpio makes this one of those occasions when your confidence is rapidly heading for the stars. If you can think it you can do it.

It is important that you answer someone’s call for assistance today. They may have got themselves into their current mess entirely by their own stupid actions but you are no stranger to making wrong choices, so help them if you can.

There is enough room in the world for people with all shades of opinion, so don’t get uptight if a friend or loved one takes an opposing view to what you believe. If you listen to what they have to say you might even learn something worth knowing.

The most important thing now is that you make a decision and stick to it. The more you chop and change today and over the weekend the less likely it is you will move closer to your long-term goals. A fixed purpose is an absolute must.

The new moon in your sign urges you to get your act together and make a brand new start. It’s no use just thinking about taking off in a new direction, at some stage you have got to make it happen. That stage can and must start today.

Speak your mind today and don’t worry about who might be offended. Everyone knows you are one of those people who puts their thoughts into words in an instant, so in a way you already have an inbuilt excuse. Try not to be too rude though.

A new moon in the area of your chart that governs your hopes and wishes will encourage you to take the kind of risks you usually prefer to avoid. There is no need to be secretive about your dreams and desires – let everyone know what you need.

Your fighting spirit will come to the fore today, most likely on the work front where you have no intention of playing second fiddle to people you consider to be your intellectual inferiors. Try not to make them look bad though – have a little compassion.

Some of the plans you made earlier in the year will bear fruit over the next few days. You have every right to be pleased with yourself for making the right calls but don’t just sit back and look smug about it – there’s still a lot to be done.

The right opportunity will arrive at exactly the right time over the coming year and all you have to do is make the most of it. With a new moon on your birthday you can be sure the universe wants you to enjoy the many good things in life.

As your ruling planet Mars moves into the most dynamic area of your chart today this should be one of the most productive times of the year for you. Put any lingering emotional problems you may have out of your mind and focus on being creative.

Try to avoid people who love making a drama out of a crisis. Petty, everyday problems may be important to them but they mean nothing to you and you must not allow them to distract you from the truly serious stuff in life – like having fun!

As Mars moves into the communications area of your chart today you will be a lot more verbally aggressive, especially when dealing with people whose minds move more slowly than your own - which is just about everyone. Try not to make enemies.

The sun in the most dynamic ear of your chart will boost your self-belief to new highs but you must not take silly risks as the new week begins, especially with money. An over-confident attitude could lead to some serious, and costly, mistakes.

The more you have been at other people’s beck and call in recent weeks the more you will now turn the tables and start making demands of them. It’s not about revenge though, it’s about making sure friends and colleagues do the right things.

There is a danger that you could see threats and hazards coming at you from all directions today but the planets indicate there is precious little to be worried about. Your fears are nothing more than phantoms of the mind – and phantoms do not exist!

Just because you have the power to force others to do your bidding does not mean you have the right to do so. The message of the stars today is that you need to be relentlessly honest and fair in your dealings with friends, relatives and colleagues.

Anyone who thinks you don’t have what it takes to succeed is about to be proved very wrong indeed. Not only is the sun moving through your sign but Mars, planet of energy and ambition, is highlighting the career area of your chart. You can’t lose!

If you are in one of those moods when you want to get away from it all then just get up and go. Mars in the most adventurous area of your chart means no one, not even your closest friends, will have the courage to stop you.

There is a danger now that you might fall out with a friend or relative who isn’t happy about the way you have been administering your joint affairs. Sit down with them today and talk things through – and talk means talk, it doesn’t mean shout!

A relationship problem CAN be resolved but you must have the courage to tackle it head-on. Up until now you have been happy to avoid any kind of confrontation but Mars in the partnership area of your chart means it’s time to be more direct.

Cosmic activity in the work area of your chart means you won’t be able to cut corners or take shortcuts – if a job is worth doing then it must be done properly. This is one of those occasions when the easy way is definitely not the best way.

Over the coming year you must get to grips with family and financial issues that up until now you have been happy to avoid. Only you have the power to resolve them to the satisfaction of everyone involved, so take control and make good things happen.

You don’t have to be sociable if you don’t feel like it. Saturn in one of the more introverted areas of your chart suggests you may be happier if left to your own devices today. You will be more in the mood for fun and games later in the week.

If you are the sort of Taurus who always likes to be in control the next 24 hours could be a little uncomfortable. You are not the only one with a stubborn streak and someone you deal with at home or at work won’t give you an inch.

You have worked so hard of late that you deserve a break, so slow down and take life at a more leisurely pace. Social activities will be a lot of fun but they could also be tiring, so be choosy about the events you grace with your presence.

Artistic activities will go well for you over the next few days but they will go even better if you join forces with people who share your creative vision. The universe doesn’t want you to be a recluse shut away alone in your studio.

This could be and should be one of the best times of the year for you and with Mars moving through your sign what you get out of life will be in direct proportion to what you choose to put in – so choose to give 100 per cent.

The more you are on the move the more you will enjoy yourself, so stop pretending that you cannot spare the time to get out and about and head off some place special to have fun with your friends. There is romance in the air as well.

Money matters should go well for you between now and the end of the week, so stop worrying that you won’t be able to make ends meet and act as if you know your needs will be met – and, miraculously, most of them will be.

Whatever you turn your hand to over the next few days will go amazingly well, so aim high and don’t listen to those who say you could be biting off more than you can chew. The more you expect from life the more life will give you.

Everyone can see that you are super confident but those who know you best also recognize that you sometimes go to extremes. The message of the stars today is that you need to tone down your act a bit – but only a bit, don’t stifle your genius!

Your horizons may seem limited at the moment but that is an illusion caused by the constant negativity you’ve been getting from other people. Find a quiet place where you can be alone with your thoughts and reaffirm your life’s purpose. Then really go for it!

You are determined to make your mark on the world and if that means you have to deal harshly with people who stand in your way then so be it. Make it clear you mean business now and you will get a lot less opposition in the future.

Others can sit around waiting for things to happen if they so choose but you must get off your rear end, get your act together and get busy making a name for yourself. With so many cosmic influences now in your favor you cannot afford to be lazy.

There is precious little you won’t be able to do this year, so think big, aim high and don’t settle for less than perfection either in your personal affairs or in your work. Show those who doubt you that you are still a force to be reckoned with.

The sun in the wealth area of your chart means you can make some serious money, but you will have to put your mind to it and play by other people’s rules as well. How much you make depends on how independent you need to be.

You may not have got the bounce of the ball of late but there is reason why you should feel sorry for yourself. Start looking at ways you can make your life more exciting and fulfilling and then make it happen. Ultimately, it’s down to you alone.

You may be inclined to worry about your working environment but if you stand back from what you are doing and look at it from a wider perspective you will see there is precious little to be anxious about. Everything will come good in time.

There is no point trying to convert people to your point of view because if anything that will make them dig in their heels and be even more obstinate in their outlook. If you want to see what true stubbornness looks like, take a look in the mirror!

Try not to get too ambitious about what you are aiming for because Uranus in the career area of your chart could upset your plans between now and the weekend. Set yourself targets that stretch you but which are still well within your reach.

If your well-laid plans hit the cosmic buffers over the next 24 hours perhaps you should ask why the universe is doing its utmost to slow you down. Most likely it’s because it knows you are heading in the wrong direction. Think again Virgo.

If you are minded to take a risk of some sort you need to do your research first and work out what you stand to lose if it goes wrong. Is it worth gambling so much on? Only you can decide but don’t take that decision in a hurry.

The sun in your sign urges you to look ahead but that does not mean you are not allowed to look back as well. This is the sort of day when, by remembering what went wrong in the past, you are more likely to do the right things now.

There is no point resenting someone because they seem to be enjoying a larger share of the luck than you are. Instead of wasting your time on such a negative emotion use your mind to work out what you have been doing wrong, and then start doing it right!

It may be true that all things are possible for those who take a chance but there will of course be some danger involved and if you are smart you will bring other people into your plans now so the risks, and the rewards, can be shared.

Are you being overly ambitious? That is the question the planets seem to be asking now and you need to answer it honestly if you want to keep making progress. Aim to do one thing really well rather than many things to only an average standard.

While those around you are cracking under pressure you seem to be growing stronger by the minute and that happy state of affairs will continue over the next few days. The sun in Scorpio is giving you the strength of character that you were previously lacking.

Scorpio may be a sign of extremes but it is by taking the middle path that you will travel further and faster over the coming year. It may not be the most adventurous route but it is the one that will take you more directly to your goals.

You may not know how or why your mind has reached a certain conclusion but you know from long experience that you would be a fool to ignore it. No matter how loudly others say you are doing it wrong you must let your intuition guide you.

The fact that someone has let you down should not in itself lead to you cutting them out of your life. They may have a very good reason, from their point of view, why they could not deliver what was promised. Find out what that reason could be.

You may have a dozen and one things on the go at the moment but the planets insist there is one thing and one thing only you should be focusing on. Slow down and let your inner voice come through and tell you what it is.

Try not to get angry with someone whose assistance you may need in the future. You know the old saying about being nice to people when you are on the way up – you may want them to be nice to you when you are on the way down!

With Mars, planet of energy and ambition, moving through your birth sign you will go all out to defend your interests if you think they are being challenged. Be careful though not to start seeing enemies where none exist. There’s no need to be paranoid.

Although there does not seem to be anything to fear you would be wise to watch your back over the next 24 hours. Someone you have dealings with may appear to be sane and stable at the moment but they could turn mad in a matter of minutes!

You may have no idea why someone is angry with you but that is all the more reason why you must find out. Maybe they have got the wrong end of the stick, or maybe you said something you did not at the time realize was provocative.

You appear to believe that you can be a knight in shining armour and slay the dragon that is attacking a friend. Have you been watching too many movies? The planets indicate that all they really need right now is some practical advice.

Don’t waste time trying to explain your position to people who are most likely incapable of understanding what you are talking about no matter how slowly you speak. Do what you feel is right and let them deal with it as best they can.

The situation you find yourself in may be uncomfortable for you but it is 10 times worse for a colleague, so make allowances for how they choose to deal with it, or not, as the case may be. In a crisis there is often no right or wrong answer.

Be smart and keep your thoughts to yourself today. The world does not have to know what is going on inside your head and on the work front especially the less senior colleagues and employers know of your plans the better. Keep them guessing.

If you get the urge to try a new way of doing things this year you must trust yourself enough to go with it. The surest way to earn that first million is by listening to your inner voice and acting on what it tells you with total self-confidence.

Don’t let a killjoy friend stop you from doing what you most enjoy. They may think they have your best interests at heart but as far as you are concerned having fun should come first whatever the risks, real or imagined, might be.

You should find it easier to reach a decision about a family matter now that Mars is moving through the domestic area of your chart but you must not impose your wishes on other people even if you are able to do so. Compromise is essential.

You will find your voice today and some of the things you have to say won’t go down well with those who would prefer you did not notice what they’ve been up to. That’s too bad, because you’re not about to let them off the hook.

You must break free of a restriction that has been holding you back for weeks, maybe months. The sun in the most dynamic area of your chart will make it easy for you to get tough with those who don’t want you to enjoy your freedom.

Mars in your sign means you are much more alert to what is going on in the world around you and if you see things you don’t like you will make it your business to do something about them. Try not to be too heavy-handed though.

You seem to be somewhat obsessive about an issue that is of no real importance and if you don’t get over it soon you will waste a lot of time and energy that could be put to better use. You don’t have to “win” – just let it go.

You cannot allow negative thoughts to get a grip on you, because once they have wormed their way into your mind it may take a long time to get rid of them again. Focus instead on what you plan to do with family and friends this coming weekend.

Upheavals of one sort or another are inevitable over the next few days but now you are aware of that fact you won’t let them get to you. Others are unlikely to be so laidback about it though, so expect a tantrum or two along the way.

If you make an effort to change just one small area of your life over the next 24 hours it will have a major knock-on effect and soon that change will become a transformation. You never know what you can do until you try Sag – so try!

If you clash with someone who is about as different from you as it is possible to get then it’s unlikely that the situation will end well. Instead, let their criticisms go over your head and act as if everything they say is a bit of a joke.

You are who you are for a good cosmic reason and anyone who thinks they can change you will be hugely disappointed. As one of the zodiac’s Fixed signs you are not now, and never will be, for turning. The sooner others understand that the better.

If you are in two minds what approach to take to a career matter that needs to be dealt with soon you could do worse than consult a friend who was recently in a similar situation. They will gladly give you the benefit of their experience.

Cosmic activity on your birthday means your generosity will know no bounds over the coming year. You must, however, be smart about who is deserving of your largesse and who is pretending to be in need so they can separate you from your money.

You may have to dig a little to get at the truth this weekend but the effort will be worth it. Someone you have dealings with on a professional level is being less than honest with you about their intentions. Find out what they are up to.

The more you are told that certain things cannot be done the more determined you will be to prove the doubters wrong. Just be careful that in your desire to impress you don’t take on a task that is beyond even your miraculous powers.

The bad news is you could find yourself reacting to one crisis after another over the next 24 hours. The good news is that each and every one of them will be minor in nature – so why not just ignore them?

Be careful you don’t take on more work than you can comfortably handle. The best way to impress employers and other important people is to avoid extremes and to finish what you started without appearing to work up much of a sweat.

This could be and should be a lucky day for you but you also need to keep an eye on the approaching full moon. When making plans, both at home and at work, avoid wishful thinking and be ultra realistic about what is possible.

If you come across as a bit too eager today you could give rivals the impression that you are desperate to succeed, which will encourage them to place obstacles in your path. Act as if you don’t have a care in the world.

A colleague or loved one seems to be battling one inner demon after another of late and your efforts to help them have not had the desired effect. Try backing off a bit and giving them the space to find their own answers.

Your way with words will open many doors over the coming year but just because they are open does not mean you have to walk through each and every one of them. Choose only those doors that let in the light.

Put your own needs first today and don’t worry that others might think you are being selfish for no good reason. Even if they are right they need to be reminded that you do not exist exclusively to serve their wants and desires.

Do you spend time meditating on the meaning of life or do you go out and party like the world is about to end? Only you can decide but bear this in mind: If you go to extremes today you may have to pay a heavy price tomorrow.

Time spent helping friends and family members will not be time wasted. The more you put yourself out for others now the more they will help you later on. In the greater scheme of things we are all interconnected, so reach out to other people.

Stand back from the creative activity you have been working on and remind yourself what the final product is supposed to look like. You have been pushing yourself so hard of late that you may have got too close to your subject matter.

A family matter that has been causing some concern will come to a head today and the good news is it won’t be half as stressful as you had feared. Most likely it was nothing more than a misunderstanding, one that can easily be ironed out.

Surround yourself with people who are positive about life and who inspire you to do more and do better. Usually you are the one who motivates others but even a Leo needs a lift now and again and you will get a big one today.

Get together with friends and colleagues who share your positive outlook on life. You don’t have to plan anything special, just by being in each other’s company you will spark the kind of spontaneous fun and games that you all enjoy.

The more adventurous you are today the more fun you will have, both on your own and alongside people who share your thrill-seeking needs. Also, if you are looking for love you will most likely find it in places others don’t think to look.

Your kindness knows no bounds but you must not let other people take advantage of that fact. The message of the stars today is that you need to be aware of what is going on around you and who is most likely to profit from your generous nature.

With love planet Venus linked to Jupiter it is no exaggeration to say that love is in the air – and just about any other area you care to look for it. If someone catches your eye today don’t look away. Let them see they attract you too.

Venus, your ruler, is nicely linked to Jupiter, planet of good fortune today, so don’t hesitate to reach out to the people you love, because they will appreciate it and will return your affection. The only tears likely to be shed are tears of joy.

It is possible that you will begin a new relationship today or over the weekend but more likely by far is that an existing relationship will become both more loving and stable. You tend to keep the passionate side of your nature well hidden, but not now!

Be as sociable as you can be today – go where you please, do as you please and get together with the kind of people you feel most in tune with. Together you will banish boredom and find news ways to enjoy the best that life has to offer.

You will be in the mood to treat yourself today and why not? After all the hard work you’ve done in recent months few would deny that you deserve a thrill or two and those who do deny it are the sort who can be safely ignored.

Don’t sit around waiting for the good things in life to come your way, get out there and seize them for yourself. Venus in your sign will point you in the direction where you can have the most fun and after that it is up to you.

If you want to be alone today that’s perfectly okay, but the planets indicate if you make even a small effort to interact with the world around you the pleasure you get from everyday connections will be immense. Think what a big effort might do!

With Venus and Jupiter connected on your birthday you will not only get all the love and affection you need but will give it back ten times over when you get the chance, and that chance will come often. A good year could turn into a great one.

If you make a wish this weekend there is every chance that it will come true between now and the turn of the year. That is even more likely if you make that wish not on your own but with friends who share your positive outlook on life.

Something you have spent ages trying to resolve will take care of itself over the next few days. No doubt you will be relieved but you may also be annoyed when you realize how simple the solution was. How did you miss it?

You must steer clear of negative feelings over the next few days, because once you allow them to get a grip it will take a huge effort to shake them off again. Whatever occurs just see it as part of the bigger plan for a better world.

Were you wrong to place your trust in someone whose way with words persuaded you to back them? Maybe, but the planets suggest you should give them a bit more time because they could be about to deliver the goods in a big way.

Get serious about your ambitions and start making those small but necessary changes that will help clear a path from where you are now to where you most want to be. A succession of measured steps will add up to a massive leap forward.

There will be times today when you find it impossible to work out when others are being serious and when they are being playful. In which case it might be wise to keep your own thoughts to yourself in case you respond the wrong way!

Focus on having fun today and don’t worry if some of your friends, and maybe even family members, say you are wasting money. Maybe you are but the planets indicate this is not the right time to worry about matters of a materialistic nature.

You need to remind yourself that in the greater scheme of things your problems are really not that important. Only then can you look for solutions without being overwhelmed by the immensity of the task. Stand back from life and see the bigger picture.

If you find yourself at odds with someone you live or work with today it’s most likely because you have different ways of looking at current events. Compromise is possible but you are under no obligation to bend too far in their direction.

You will need to stay on your toes mentally over the next 24 hours because if you lose focus for even a few minutes your plans are sure to go awry. Also, you could miss out on a golden opportunity to improve your standing on the work front.

What seems right and proper to friends and colleagues may not seem right and proper to you and if that is the case you must not betray your principles. You have never been the sort to follow the herd and there is no reason why you should start now.

Forget about where you are coming from and focus on where you are going to. The fact that you have reached your current position through sheer hard work and intelligence should be enough to convince you that you have what it takes to climb even higher.

The message of the stars today is that although it may be painful to let go of something that has been a part of your life for so long it will, in time, bring a real sense of freedom. Don’t wait any longer, start cutting the bonds today.

The message of your birthday chart is that all work and no play is not a recipe for either happiness or success. You need to get the balance right over the coming year: Find ways to have fun in your work, while working hard at having fun.

This is the perfect day to take time out of your busy schedule and enjoy some down time with family and friends. Whatever disagreements you may have had in the past you can and you must talk to each other and find ways to get past them.

Today’s sun-Mars link could make you rather touchy, so watch what you say because there is a danger you could say too much. At this time of year especially you should be trying to smooth over differences rather than making them look even larger.

Someone you think of as a friend is likely to say something today that makes you wonder if really they have been a secret enemy all along. Almost certainly you are overreacting and reading far too much into their words. Try not to be so sensitive.

If you are smart you will keep your opinions about potentially contentious subjects to yourself today. Mars in your sign tends to make you a bit too aggressive at times and this is not the best day of the year to start a fight.

If you have something to say that is unlikely to go down well with loved ones you are advised to put your words on hold and bring them up another time. Try to make this a day for bringing people together rather than driving them even further apart.

You have never been the sort to believe every word you are told, even if it comes from a source that most people trust, and if you have your suspicions that you are being fed false information then by all means ignore it. Trust your instincts instead.

If you find yourself in a heated discussion with a loved one today you should call a halt until you both calm down. If you can overlook your differences in the holiday season you might even be able to do it for the rest of the year.

No doubt family matters are uppermost in your mind at the moment but it will pay you to find an hour or two to think about your career prospects going into the new year. What will your next move be in your quest for success?

You may be inclined to turn a blind eye to someone’s bad behaviour today but if you do they will undoubtedly behave in even worse ways in the future. Bad manners must not be tolerated, at this festive time of year or any other time.

The news you receive today will be open to interpretation and whether you see it as “good” or “bad” is entirely up to you. You won’t have to make a decision about the matter until the new year, so forget about it for the next week or so.

A sun-Mars link on your birthday suggests there will be tensions over the coming year whenever your own financial interests overlap with other people’s financial interests. There will though be plenty of cash to go around, so find ways to cooperate.

The tougher you have been with various people in recent days the nicer you should be to them now. You have made your point of view clear and there is no reason why you should not be friends again, and plenty of reasons why you should.

It’s more than likely that you have spent too much money over the past week or so but there is no point regretting it. Cosmic activity across the financial axis of your chart suggests you will get the chance to top up your reserves very soon.

It is important that you don’t make a big thing of your differences with friends and family members but you must not go too far and pretend they do not exist. That won’t bring the quiet life you crave, just more grief later on.

You may be in the kind of mood where you are willing to do anything for just about anyone but you must also make it clear that this is a one-off offer that won’t be repeated. You cannot afford to be this generous each and every day.

Anyone who tries to tie you down to one place or one activity between now and the weekend needs to be told you are having none of it. Your free spirit must be given its head, otherwise you will be miserable as the new year approaches.

There is no point trying to adopt a low profile today because the eyes of friends and family members will be on you and they won’ t let you hide away. And why would you want to when they all seem to believe you are some kind of star?

If you are on the move today you will have a great time, but you also need to be careful because if you go too fast you could find yourself so far ahead that you have to wait for others to catch up. It’s not a race.

You are in one of those moods when you would give the shirt off your back if someone needs it more than you. The only danger is you could fall foul of a swindler who sees an opportunity to take advantage of your generous nature. Be careful.

You don’t have to share the same outlook as co-workers to be able to get along with them on a creative level. The fact that you are so different could even be a positive thing in that it doubles both your ideas and your chances of success.

Your path to your immediate goal is likely to be blocked between now and the weekend but that should not be a problem for someone as resourceful as you. Use your imagination and find a different route to where you most need to be.

Why do you feel the need to be bigger and better than everyone else? Whatever the reason you must get past it quickly because it will take up time and energy that could be used more productively elsewhere. Accept who you are and be proud of it.

It may be tempting to let other people make decisions for you today but if you do you will probably regret it come the weekend. The only person you can trust to make the right calls is yourself, so don’t give your power away.

A Mercury-Jupiter link on your birthday will enable you to see events from the other person’s point of view. That will be useful when it comes to dealing with those whose words and actions seem illogical. You will know what inner needs drive them.

Mercury in your fellow fire sign of Sagittarius makes it easy to talk things through with partners and colleagues and that’s good because there will be some serious challenges to deal with over the next few days. You will handle them all with ease.

If you push yourself just a little bit harder today the momentum you create will carry you through the weekend and well into next week. By the time the new moon arrives on Monday you will be eager to set your sights high and do something amazing.

There is no point trying too hard to impress other people today because your efforts will most likely be wasted. It would appear that partners and colleagues have a lot on their minds at the moment, so don’t expect much in the way of praise.

Not everything will go smoothly today and over the weekend but you can make things easier for yourself by not making a big deal about delays and disruptions. You are still moving toward your desired destination but it may take a little longer to get there.

The sun in Capricorn at this time of year means you have much to look forward to. Why then the feeling of impending doom? Most likely it is today’s Mercury-Saturn link that has you feeling a bit gloomy. Come the weekend you’ll feel much better.

With Saturn active in the work and well-being area of your chart you would be wise not to take on too much. Even if friends and family members beg you to help them out you must make it clear that this time they are on their own.

The more you are urged to move faster, either at work or in your private affairs, the more you should keep plodding along at your own sweet pace. Let others know that everything which needs to be done will get done when the time is right.

You need to accept that you are good at some things and not so good at others. The planets warn if you try to be the best at everything you will waste time and energy that could have been used for more constructive, and enjoyable, activities.

You may think that you know best, and maybe you do, but you need to be aware that not everyone looks at the world the same way as you. The “facts” of your current situation may not be as cut and dried as you imagine them to be.

Like it or not you are going to have to cut back on your spending over the next few days. If that seems too painful to contemplate then find new sources of income instead. One way or the other you need to balance the books – now, not later on!

You are advised not to make any hard and fast plans today and over the weekend, not least because Monday’s new moon will bring new ideas and new opportunities and new people into your life. For now, just relax and let life tick along as it is.

Although most things will come easy to you this year one thing will be very hard to master and that is what you must focus on. While others coast along within their comfort zone you will be striking out in new directions and making a name for yourself.

You will have words with a loved one when you find out they have been playing fast and loose with the truth. Having said which, is what they failed to tell you of any real importance? If not, it might be better just to let it pass.

If you get the opportunity to pull ahead of your rivals this weekend you must seize it with both hands. You won’t find it hard to be assertive, and come the new moon on Monday you will be enjoying the financial and professional rewards.

As the old year comes to a close you should be spending at least some of your time now looking back and assessing your journey so far. Only then will you be in a position to decide what your next major moves are going to be.

Someone in a position of authority will be asking you some searching questions between now and the weekend and if you don’t know the answers it may not be good for your reputation. You must keep up with the gossip at work.

You should know from past experience that if you go to extremes it tends to provoke an extreme reaction, so slow down, calm down and don’t let other people’s words and actions get to you on an emotional level. It’s not worth the hassle.

As Mars in your sign opposes mind planet Mercury today there could be a divergence of opinions when dealing with partners and colleagues. But just because you don’t agree on all things does not mean you cannot agree on what truly matters.

You may not feel on top of the world at the moment but don’t get too depressed because there are good cosmic reasons to believe that your luck is changing for the better. If you don’t feel like making an effort then give yourself the day off.

If you are asked for your opinion on a subject that you know is controversial you must be honest about what you think. Not everyone will like what you have to say but that’s their problem – and maybe next time they will ask someone else!

Your confidence may be high at the moment but today’s Mars-Mercury link could cause a bit of worry where travel and social plans are concerned. Nothing bad is going to happen but you will need to reassess how you intend to spend your time.

As today’s Mars-Mercury link cuts across the financial axis of your chart you must not make any hasty decisions about your money situation. The more others insist that you do something right away, the more you must take your time and get it right.

You cannot afford to approach the year ahead without some sort of strategy. Taking each day as it comes is all very well but if you want your long-term plans to come good you must have a clear overview of your route to lasting success.

You have energy to spare at the moment and that’s just as well because someone you work with is going to need your assistance. If you can help them get out of a rut today you will be in their good books for a long time to come.

There is a danger that you could be a bit too generous for your own good over the next 24 hours, so promise yourself now that you will only give handouts to those people who truly deserve it. You’re not made of money after all.

The message of the stars today is that you must go with the flow and not allow yourself to worry if the direction you are heading is not the one you would have chosen. One way or another you will get where you most need to be.

You need to come out of your shell and be more of a mover and shaker. To start with, stop worrying about problems that exist only in your imagination and direct your energy towards goals that can improve your life in tangible ways.

Some thoughts you can share with others and some thoughts must be kept to yourself and if you are not sure which is which at the moment then it might be best to say nothing at all. Why risk giving your rivals an unearned advantage?

According to the planets you owe someone a favour and if you get the chance to repay it today you must do so. If you don’t even things out now the feeling that you are getting something for nothing will start nagging at your conscience.

If you are on the verge of giving up on a puzzle that you can’t seem to crack then leave it for a day or two and focus on matters that are not so challenging. The answer will pop into your mind when you least expect it.

You have no intention of hiding yourself away where the big bad world can’t find you. You sincerely believe this will be the year when, by putting yourself front and centre, you make a seriously good name for yourself, and earn some seriously big rewards.

You may have to make some kind of adjustment today, most likely because you aimed a bit too high and now realize you won’t hit your target unless you make changes. Don’t get angry with yourself: mistakes are how we learn and grow.

Avoid getting pulled into other people’s disputes, which are sure to be petty and cannot benefit you in any way at all. No matter how much friends and colleagues beg you to sign up to their side you can and you must stay neutral.
