You are such a force of nature that a lot of the time you can bludgeon your way to success and no one will come back at you, but not today. If other people call your bluff, and they will, you could end up looking foolish.

If you make an effort to be nice to everyone you meet today the universe will make an effort to be nice to you. Not only that but your mood will improve dramatically when you see what a difference a simple smile can make.

Social activities will go well today and over the weekend but you also need to keep your eye on a domestic situation that could easily spiral out of control. Make it your business to calm things down and ease loved ones’ fears.

Good news about your cashflow situation is on its way, so stop worrying about where your next meal is coming from and act as if you are worth millions. If you can trick your mind into believing that it might even come true.

Friendships are under excellent stars at the moment, so make it your business to get out into the world and have fun with people who share your outlook and ambitions. But avoid the fools who always think the world is about to end.

If you pay attention to what a loved one says today it could open up a new range of possibilities. Yes, they have said things before that did not come true but this time they appear to have some genuine insight into what’s going on.

The more storms and upheavals you have endured in recent weeks the more you will enjoy what occurs today and over the weekend. If a new path opens up before you don’t hesitate to follow it, because it could take you to a brand new world.

No task is too much for you now, so if you feel the need to prove yourself then take on the biggest challenge you can find. Anyone who has you pegged as a lazybones is about to discover just how dynamic you can be.

The reason your previous aims fell short is because they were too wide and too detailed at the same time. To compensate, don’t make any plans at all for the coming year, just take each day as it comes. The universe will guide you.

Mars, your ruler, in one of the more secretive areas of your chart could make you overly suspicious this weekend. There is no reason to believe that your enemies are aiming to bring you down. There is no evidence that your enemies even exist.

You need to deal severely with someone who seems to think they can order you to do this and do that and follow their every whim and command. The next 48 hours could prove to be a very steep learning curve for them.

Don’t try to be subtle in getting your message across this weekend because the people you will be dealing with are most likely too stupid to get the hint. Just spell out the consequences for them if they refuse to see sense.

Because you are so passionate about your beliefs you will clash with someone who feels equally as strongly as you but from the opposite position. On this occasion there is clearly no room for compromise, so may the best Cancer win!

Not everyone will approve of what you get up to this weekend but you won’t care in the slightest. As far as you are concerned you have fulfilled your obligations to loved ones and now you are off the leash and can have some fun.

Take care this weekend when meeting new people in your local environment. There may be no obvious reason why they might end up being bad for you but they will certainly have hidden motives for wanting to befriend you, so be on your guard.

Don’t let people making big promises turn your head this weekend. The more they try to persuade you that they can do this and do that for you the more inclined you should be to do those things for yourself. You don’t need their help.

Mars in your sign gives you the energy and the confidence to get rid of all those things from your life that are getting in the way and holding you back. Your sign has a reputation for ruthlessness and now is the time to live up to it.

Major changes in your world are on the way and you need to be ready for them. To start with you should cut your links with people who don’t share your positive outlook on life. Make that your primary goal this weekend.

It must be clear to you by now that something you did wrong is no longer worth worrying about and you need to get over it. What’s done is done and cannot be undone, so put it out of your mind and move on.

You will lock horns with someone whose outlook on life is the opposite of your own this weekend and it’s unlikely that you will part as friends. Next week though you must patch things up with them, because you are going to need one another.

Someone whose attitude leaves a lot to be desired will annoy you this weekend but the planets warn they are not about to change their ways, so don’t waste your time on them. Put some distance between you so they cannot disrupt your plans.

What is your philosophy of life? Do you even have one? The planets reveal that you can make significant progress over the coming year IF you have a clear idea about what to believe. It doesn’t have to be dramatic, just an outline to guide you.

You have been a bit unsure of yourself in recent weeks but your confidence will return over the next few days. The really good news though is that you can use it to move closer to a goal you previously thought was impossible to reach.

If your workload is getting to the point where you believe you can no longer cope then obviously you need to make changes. Start by letting employers and colleagues know you will NOT be taking on any more of their responsibilities.

If you fell out with someone over the weekend you should aim to be the best of friends again by close of play today. Whatever it was you disagreed about just put it behind you and move on. In the greater scheme of things it’s of no importance.

There can be no firm guarantees that what you are working on is going to be a success in the long-term but don’t let that bother you. Keep doing what you are doing with passion and commitment and enjoy the process more than the outcome.

Your way with words is such that no one will be able to say “NO” to you today, so ask away and enjoy the good things that come your way. Don’t be selfish though – use your communication skills to help others get what they want as well.

It is probably inevitable that you will clash with someone today whose opinions you find distasteful but it is not inevitable that you become enemies as a result. Simply agree to disagree and then focus on areas where you think along similar lines.

It’s not like you to get emotional but the planets indicate that you may need to channel some of your more negative feelings into activities that promote positive outcomes. It would help, as well, if you think the best of people rather than the worst.

You may not be in a light-hearted mood at the moment but that’s okay, in fact it’s good. There are major issues that need to be dealt with and you are more likely to resolve them if you steer clear of people who don’t take life seriously.

Don’t waste your time trying to convince someone that your facts are better than their facts. Experience should have taught you that most things in life are relative in nature. Those who refuse to acknowledge that fact rarely learn anything.

You must live up to a promise you made earlier in the year, even if it means focusing less on your own needs for a while. Few things in life are more important than your reputation, so don’t put it at risk by failing to deliver.

You must watch what you say over the next 24 hours because your words could have far-reaching consequences. If you come across as a bit too aggressive in the way you talk to people they are unlikely to be very helpful towards you.

Although you prefer to find compromise solutions in most situations the planets warn you must now insist on getting your own way. If you give others the impression that you are happy to give more than you get you could end up with nothing.

So many people will want to get close to you over the coming year that it could at times get a bit claustrophobic. You may be a nice guy by nature – that’s why others like you so much – but you can and you must protect your personal space.

Although you may want to help a friend get past their current dark mood you must be careful in case some of that mood rubs off on you. Turn the situation around by laughing at their concerns – with luck your laughter will rub off on them.

Start early and finish late today and make sure you get the most from every minute in between. From the moment you wake until the moment you fall asleep, most likely exhausted, act as if the world is depending on you.

With the sun and Mercury moving through the most dynamic area of your chart this is a special time for you, but don’t fall into the trap of thinking you are so special that you can do as you please. The universe might not agree with you.

You always go out of your way to assist family members but sometimes you also need to stand back and let them figure out life for themselves. Give a loved one a pointer in the right direction today but insist they put in the hard yards themselves.

The best way to deal with someone who is getting on your nerves is to find something for them to do that will keep them away from you for long stretches of time. Hopefully they will fall for it and leave you in peace.

If you need to make money fast you may be tempted to follow up an idea that came to you a while back but which you rejected at the time as unlikely to work. Maybe now you are desperate you can find creative ways to make it work.

Although the sun in your sign makes all things possible you must not fall into the trap of trying to do everything. Select just two or three goals and focus on those to the exclusion of everything else. Focus your energy, don’t waste it.

If you go out of your way to assist someone in need today the universe will come to your aid later on when it’s you who needs a helping hand. No deed, be it good or bad, is ever truly forgotten, so always do the right thing.

The more others tell you that you need to give ground the more you will dig in your heels and refuse to budge. The only danger is that some of your more sneaky rivals could insist that you do the opposite of what they really want.

Someone in a position of authority thinks highly of your abilities and will do what they can to promote you. All that is required of you is that you live up to your claims of what you are capable of – so don’t make those claims lightly.

Cosmic activity in the most adventurous area of your chart means you are going places. But don’t head off into the wide blue yonder without some kind of plan. Know where it is you want to end up, even if you don’t yet know what route to take.

Don’t go overboard in your efforts to declutter your life. There are so many things you no longer need but if you junk it all in one go you could regret it later on. Get it done by the end of the year, not the end of the week!

Make it your aim for the coming 12 months to greet every day with a smile and every challenge with joyful acceptance. If your philosophy of life is to find happiness in each and every moment then even the bad days will turn out to be good.

Be careful how you talk to people today because your words may come across as arrogant or even aggressive, even though that may not be your intention. Not everyone is as robust as you, so take their sensitivity into account.

Don’t worry too much if you find it hard to share in other people’s enthusiasm for whatever fun and games they are currently involved with. These are serious times and it’s quite natural that you should see some people as annoyingly frivolous.

You don’t have to put profit before principles today but you do have to make sure that other people cannot take advantage of your charitable nature. With Mercury, your ruler, at odds with Jupiter you could be too generous for your own good.

You need to raise your game on the work front so that your employer and senior colleagues can see you are taking events as seriously as they are. Deep down you may not take them seriously at all but don’t let them know that.

It’s not like you to get stage fright but for some reason you seem reluctant to put on a show. If you have already committed yourself you will have to swallow your fear and get on with it anyway. Don’t worry, your star quality always shines through.

Because Mercury, your ruling planet, is on poor terms with Jupiter you must make a conscious effort to steer clear of extremes. You could so easily drift too far in one direction and end up making enemies of people who could have been friends.

Someone in a position of authority will sing your praises today but for some reason you can’t quite believe what they say. Your instincts are spot on as usual because the planets warn they are softening you up for negative news, so prepare yourself.

Try not to get depressed by all the bad things going on in the world. You may not be able to control events but you can control how you react to them, so resolve to look for the golden thread of goodness that runs through all people.

You need to have a deeper think about a project you are about to embark on. Will it be a good use of your time? Will it bring the rewards you hope for? Most of all, will it be cost efficient? You need to answer those questions.

Before you tell someone what you really think of them try to envisage what the consequences might be. You may think you are being helpful but from their point of view it could seem like a declaration of war. Maybe keep your thoughts to yourself?

If your energy levels drop off today just accept it and wait until they rise again before pushing ahead with your plans. You’re not on the clock and a bit of rest and relaxation could do you the world of good. Slow the tempo right down.

You may be full of enthusiasm for a project of some kind but the planets warn not everyone shares your passion. Make it your business today to find out why they are so reluctant to get involved. Their concerns could be valid.

A Mercury-Jupiter link on your birthday will encourage you to aim high but you must not expect too much of yourself. Even a Libra has limits and you will accomplish much more this year if the goals you set yourself remain well within them.

If you feel a bit half-hearted about what you are working on then put it on the back burner for a bit and focus on something more interesting. Most likely you just feel a bit jaded because you have been laboring at it for so long.

If you need to make a decision about an important relationship you are advised to wait until mind planet Mercury moves into your opposite sign on the 6th. Only then will your thoughts be clear enough for you to make a rational choice.

Far too many people are taking far too many things seriously, so make it your business to remind them that life is supposed to be fun. The best way to do that is to show them by personal example how easy it is to laugh and love.

You may have the courage and the confidence to deal with whatever life throws at you but not everyone is as robust and resolute as you, so make allowances for those who can’t stand the pace and, where possible, help them to stay on their feet.

Some rather sensitive feelings are coming to the surface and you’re not sure what to do about them. The simple fact is they won’t leave you alone until you have dealt with the events that provoked them. Make that your task for the day.

A nasty shock could come your way between now and the weekend but in the greater scheme of things it will be of only minor significance, so deal with it calmly and carefully and impress those around you by how unfazed you remain.

You may have good reason to be suspicious of someone’s motives but don’t go to extremes and start reading trouble into every little thing they say and do. It is highly unlikely they are trying to cheat you, so keep your mind free of fear.

Although you always look super confident on the outside you get anxious like everyone else and at some stage today you will have to admit to a friend that you could do with some help. Hopefully they will give you the pep talk you need.

Mars in the most sensitive area of your chart makes it easy to believe you have enemies around every corner but it isn’t true. You may have rubbed a few people the wrong way recently but that’s par for the course for a Sag.

Generally speaking you could not care less what other people think about what you are doing but for some reason it now seems important to get their approval. Don’t go begging for it though. You’re still the boss, so let them come to you!

You need to be careful when dealing with someone in a position of power, not least because they are beginning to suspect you may have your sights on their job! It’s good that you are so ambitious but try not to make it too obvious.

Some people appear to believe that the world is full of doom and gloom but you know the world is what you choose to make of it, so resolve to have fun today and, if others insist on being miserable, keep them at arm’s length.

You will be on the move again over the coming year and your travels will take you to places that are not just exciting but mentally stimulating as well. Librans know there is always something new to learn – that is why they look so young!

The planets warn if you ask people what they think of your latest big idea you will most likely get a negative answer. So keep what you are doing to yourself and just get on with it. You don’t need advice, and certainly not criticism.

The fact that you have a radically different view of life to one of your friends suggests that you may fall out today. In the greater scheme of things though it is quite a trivial difference, so get past it quickly and have fun together.

There are a few loose ends that need to be dealt with before the weekend arrives, so get on to them now so you can move ahead freely. There is also a lot of junk in your life that needs getting rid of. Time for a clear-out!

You don’t need anyone’s permission to follow your dream, so decide what you must do to move closer to your long-term goal and then go for it with all your might. If that upsets some of your more old-fashioned friends it means you’re on the right track!

There is something you feel you need to say but may be reluctant to give voice to it because you know some people will be offended. Since when did you care so much for their feelings? Speak up and get it over with. They’ll survive.

You will need to couple self-belief with a large dose of common sense today if you are to turn a dream into a reality. Simply thinking about it won’t make it happen, so put one foot in front of the other and start moving toward your goal.

The fact that a situation has not worked out the way you expected may be annoying but could also be beneficial. Looking back you will realize that by going wrong it probably saved you from yourself. Maybe your guardian angel had something to do with it.

If you use your powers of persuasion wisely today you can get others to do the hard stuff for you. Your way with words is such that even those who don’t want to assist you can be swayed to lend a helping hand, or even two.

It can be exhausting trying to live up to the image you think other people have of you, so forget about trying to impress friends, colleagues and employers and just be yourself. You may find that impresses them more than anything else.

You have no choice but to be honest with a friend whose current troubles are self-induced. You won’t do them any favors by skirting round the facts, so give it to them straight and show what they can do to help themselves.

The more you are generous with your time and energy today the more others will be generous toward you over the weekend. Also, make an effort to chat with the kind of people you don’t seem to have much in common with. They may surprise you.

You will need to change the way you work drastically over the next 24 hours, because if you don’t your rivals could pull ahead of you. Fortunately, Pisces is one of the more flexible signs of the zodiac, so it should not be too big a deal.

You will find your voice this year and, having found it, you will sing out about what you believe must be done both at home and at work. The world needs people who are not afraid to voice an opinion. The world needs you!

Mercury’s influence in your chart means you will have plenty to say for yourself this weekend, but if what you say turns out to be untrue it could cause trouble. Don’t just repeat what others have told you, check it out for yourself.

It would appear that an idea you have long used to guide your actions has outlived its usefulness and must now be replaced. Don’t try to hold on to it because it has become so familiar, be brutal and junk it straight away.

Mercury, your ruler, may be moving through the most dynamic area of your chart but it is also linked with Saturn, planet of restriction, this weekend, so you won’t get everything your own way. You are not the only mover and shaker!

It may be that a colleague has taken advantage of your generosity and enriched themselves at your expense but don’t get bitter about it. They saw an opportunity and took it, something you have done many times in the past. Let it go and move on.

If you find yourself in a tight situation this weekend you may try to bluff your way out of it, but there is no guarantee you will succeed. It could be that your rivals have worked out your game plan, so you will need to adapt.

There is no perfect time to make your move, so stop waiting for the wind to change or for the sun to come out from behind the clouds. Take a few small steps this weekend and expect to be taking giant strides by the end of next week.

If you know what you want from the weekend you are sure to get it, but it may come at a price. If you push yourself too hard or move ahead too quickly you could take an unexpected tumble, so rein in your enthusiasm a bit.

You can see that fate is pointing you in a certain direction but you seem reluctant to take it. Is there a sensible reason for that or are you just being obstinate? Most likely it’s the latter, so wise up and follow the cosmic hints you’ve been given.

If you help someone in need over the next 48 hours they will appreciate it immensely and do things for you in the future. Don’t hesitate to put your own plans on hold for a while, because you will gain more from it than you lose.

Cosmic activity in the career area of your chart means you know with the utmost clarity what it is you should be doing to move up in the world. Some of your colleagues may be alarmed that you seem so ambitious but that’s their problem, not yours!

You may have firm opinions about what needs to be done but not everyone agrees with you and if you try to force through the changes you want to see there could be trouble. Don’t ignore the people who disagree with you, talk to them.

Because everyone else seems so enthusiastic about a plan or project you may feel that you must be enthusiastic as well, but that isn’t so. If you have doubts about it you must speak up. Chances are you are not the only one.

Don’t fret too much about your money situation over the coming year because for the most part it will take care of itself. Instead, focus your mind on matters of a more mystical nature. If you go looking for the meaning of life you will find it.

Anyone who doubts you have what it takes to reach the top will have to reconsider now as you go all out to prove you’re the best at what you do. You need to be careful though. Tomorrow’s full moon could stir your emotions to boiling point.

Don’t worry too much if you start having doubts about what you are working on. The approaching full moon may be undermining your confidence but the situation is no different to what it was a week or a month ago, so stick with it.

You will have to make a difficult choice today, the kind of choice you would prefer to avoid but know you can no longer run away from. It comes down to choosing between your home life and your work your loyalty must be with your loved ones.

Tomorrow’s full moon takes place in the career area of your chart, so some kind of upheaval on the work front is more likely than not. The good news is it will only be a passing storm, so stay calm and allow the situation to blow itself out.

You are going to have to make some important decisions over the next few days and with Mercury joining Mars in the family area of your chart you need to be aware that those decisions are going to affect other people as well. So make them gently.

Financial matters are in a state of transition at the moment, so make a conscious decision not to waste your hard-earned cash on purchases that bring short-term pleasure rather than long-term profits. Virgos are supposed to be good with money!

If you allow yourself to get uptight about things you cannot change you will make it even more likely that other people will make choices that affect you personally. The best way to deal with the approaching full moon is to pretend it does not exist!

As communications planet Mercury moves into your sign today you must speak up and say things you know some people don’t want to hear. You won’t care in the slightest if they are offended by your harsh words. It’s their fault for being so stupid.

As tomorrow’s full moon takes place in the antagonistic sign of Aries you will be furious about what you see as a terrible injustice. Before you make accusations against other people though make sure they can’t make the same sort of accusations against you.

Don’t try too hard to assert yourself over the next few days, because you could easily go too far and annoy people in positions of power. They won’t much like it if you get on your high horse and claim to be morally superior to everyone else.

There will be a lot of accusations flying about today and if you are smart you will pretend you can’t hear a word of it. If you allow yourself to get involved it’s likely you will upset at least 50 per cent of the people you work with.

By all means make alliances with people who share your ambitions but make sure it’s because you want to do the right thing rather than just make a profit. Money is important, of course, but being on the right side morally is what it’s really about.

The message of your birthday chart this year is that you need to reconsider your attitude towards material things. It’s not money and possessions that bring long-term happiness but the love and understanding you share with other people. They’re priceless.

Today’s full moon in your sign could have you behaving in a rather emotional manner, so keep an eye on yourself and if you seem to losing control just walk away from whatever situation is causing you grief. You don’t HAVE to get involved.

You may look fearless to the world at large but you have doubts and anxieties like everyone else and some of them could break through to the surface today. There is no point trying to deny your feelings, so acknowledge them and deal with them.

There is such a sense of urgency about you at the moment that you run the risk of pushing ahead too quickly and making a costly mistake. Map out each move you are going to make before you actually get going. You’re not on the clock.

Have you taken a wrong turning? Maybe, but even if you have you can get back on track a little bit further down the line, so stick at it and don’t worry or hurry. The universe will give you a gentle nudge in the right direction.

If you are planning your next vacation, or even just thinking about a trip you want to take in the future, you must be realistic about how much it will cost. If you know you can afford it that’s fine. If not, maybe lower your sights a bit.

You will get conflicting advice today about a business matter of some kind and while the moon is full you would be wise not to take any final decisions. If others try to rush you maybe that’s not a good sign. Be cautious.

A full moon in the partnership area of your chart warns that some of the people you deal with today could get a bit touchy for no good reason. Promise yourself in advance that not matter how provocative their actions may be you won’t react in kind.

All work and no play makes Scorpio a dull water sign, so give yourself permission to have fun and avoid people who seem to enjoy grinding out the days without a smile on their face. Let your hair down and let yourself go – a bit.

Teamwork is always essential but never more so than now. Both at home and at work you must look past your differences with loved ones and colleagues and focus on the things you have in common – a lot more than what keeps you apart.

There is a lot of emotional junk that you need to get rid of and if you start the process today you will see results before the end of the week. Any regrets you may have, and any ill feeling you have for other people, must be left behind.

A loved one’s last minute-change of plan will annoy you but there is nothing you can do about it. It may even work in your favour as it gives you an excuse to go it alone, which may be what you wanted to do in the first place.

Full moons are always tricky but this one could be costly financially too. If you think you know what’s going on then almost certainly you don’t, so keep your money in your pocket until you know for sure what is really at stake.

You will be extremely busy this year and you must make sure that what you are working on is for your benefit and no one else’s. That may sound a bit selfish but you won’t get much help from other people, so you can only help yourself.

You must resist the urge to get a task finished by cutting corners, because if you go down that route the end result won’t be anywhere near as good as you expected. Either make a good job of it or don’t do it at all. Never compromise.

It might be a smart idea to keep a low profile over the next 24 hours while the effects of yesterday’s full moon play themselves out. You are under no obligation to stick your head above the parapet and offer your rivals a target.

If you discover that someone has been nosing around in your personal affairs then you must do something about it. Confront them in a quiet place where they can’t get away from you and tell them to stop … or else!

Jupiter in your sign links with Venus today, so you can expect some very good news to come your way. If you receive an invitation to a party or a social event you must accept. You could meet someone there who lights up your life.

Sometimes you have to work with people you would rather avoid and one such person will stick close to you today. If you put on an act and pretend to be delighted they are there they may not give you as much trouble as you expected.

Venus in your sign is nicely aligned with luck planet Jupiter today, which suggests that someone you are close to emotionally – or someone you would like to be close to – will bring good things your way. Friendships of all sorts will thrive.

Venus, your ruler, is currently moving through the most sensitive area of your chart, so you probably won’t be as outgoing as you can be. It’s okay to spend some time alone though, especially when you have so much to think about.

Someone who loves you deeply will give you some great advice today but being the stubborn sort you may be reluctant to take it. That would be a serious mistake. On this occasion they appear to know better than you what you actually need.

Try to be a bit more relaxed today. A Venus-Jupiter link indicates you will get more done if you don’t push yourself too hard. Sit back and let life come to you for a change. You don’t have to be a constant whirlwind of activity.

You need to get back to basics. The planets warn that in one or more areas of your life you have allowed things to get overcomplicated and that is now holding you back. Focus on your primary aim and forget about everything else for a while.

A little of what you fancy will do you the world of good today, so stop acting as if everyone who openly enjoys life isn’t being serious enough and join in the fun and games for a while. You’re allowed to smile, maybe even laugh!

Because you are so easily distracted you may find that the plans you make early in the day are nowhere near completion by the end of the day. But that’s okay. You have always been a dreamer and there is no point trying to change yourself now.

Jupiter in the career area of your chart means you must give yourself permission to be the biggest and the best at what you do. You may not want to draw attention to yourself but you will probably find you secretly enjoy being in the spotlight.

Your fate may be in the hands of other people now but that is no excuse to sit back and do nothing. Yours is a sign noted for its energy and enthusiasm, so don’t wait for good things to happen, get out there and make them happen!

By all means do what you can to improve your position on the work front but make sure it’s not at the expense of other people. No matter how ambitious you may be you should always put principle ahead of profit and power.

The doom and gloom merchants seem to be out in force at the moment and it would be easy to fall under their spell. The world is still a wonderful place and there are so many things you can do to make it even better.

In one area of your life you seem to be making remarkable progress but in another area your efforts seem to be at a standstill. Maybe you should take the cosmic hint and recognize that the latter is not what the universe wants you to be doing.

You may want to help a friend in need but before you do you would be wise to assess the situation and work out if your assistance would actually do any good. On this occasion it might be best to let them learn from their own mistakes.

What starts slowly early in the day will kick into gear by the afternoon and by the evening it will be sailing along at a rate of knots. Keep your sights fixed on your destination point and you will be there before you know it.

Everyone and his dog could be against you at the moment and you would not care in the slightest. The sun in your sign endows you with supreme self-confidence and the can-do aura you give off to the world will carry you through to success.

Make use of Mars in your sign to lay down the law so that everyone knows what you want from them. You won’t have to spell out what could happen if they fail to live up to your expectations – their imaginations will fill in the gaps.

If a loved one asks you to do something today that you know will cost you in terms of time and money then do so gladly. They have helped you without question many times in the past, so take the opportunity to pay something back.

You cannot expect everything in your life to run smoothly at the moment but if you showcase your talents it won’t be long before the powers that be recognize your worth and reward you accordingly. You will soon be playing a much bigger role.

You may not want to make a decision that you know will affect a friend or loved one in ways they won’t appreciate but you clearly have no choice. If they cannot get their act together then for their own benefit you must do it for them.

If you are in two minds about which direction to move in then stay where you are. According to the planets your current indecision is a sign that you are not supposed to make that choice just yet. There may be other options you need to consider.

It’s not true that Librans are lazy. On the contrary, as one of the zodiac’s cardinal signs you are driven to succeed and that ambition will be on display daily over the coming year. Don’t drive yourself into the ground though – get help when you need it.

What you think is important now will fade into insignificance early next week, so stay calm and don’t think the world is coming to an end. Let others wallow in doom and gloom if they so wish – you are under no obligation to join them.

Your actions have got a bit too obvious of late and you need to stir things up. Not only will that keep your rivals guessing but it will make you more excited about your tasks, which means you will make a much better job of them.

If you get something wrong over the next 24 hours just tell yourself that it’s no big deal and wait for the universe to give you a second chance, which it will. Fortunately, the sun in your fellow air sign of Libra makes you super selfconfident.

Something will happen today or over the weekend that brings a smile to your face, most likely because it means you have nothing to worry about, whereas before you thought the sky was about to fall. It’s all good and about to get even better.

If something out of the ordinary occurs today you must not ignore it. It could be a coded message from the universe that you need to adjust your thinking and then adjust your sights as well. Chances are your goals have become too predictable.

The suspicious side of your nature is prodding you to believe that someone is out to do you harm, but where is the evidence? Most likely your fears have got a bit out of hand, so make a conscious effort to control them.

The sun in the friendship area of your chart will make it easy for you to win people round to your way of thinking. Once you have done that you must get your heads together and decide how to turn those thoughts into actions.

Because you aim higher than most other people you sometimes feel bad when your efforts fall short of the targets you have set for yourself. Remind yourself today that you are human like everyone else – though still better, of course.

You have so much going for you now but for some reason you still believe that a major catastrophe is lurking round the next corner. No it isn’t. Ignore your fears and act as if nothing can possibly go wrong in your life – and it won’t.

You must take other people’s opinions into account before you make your next move. On the home front, especially, if you push ahead with plans that loved ones have doubts about you could cause a rift that takes a long time to heal.

The message of the stars this weekend is that you have been trying too hard of late and need to go easier on yourself . No one expects you to be a miracle worker so why would you expect it of yourself? You have limits like everyone else.

If someone you don’t entirely trust starts waving the flag and appealing to your sense of duty you must be on your guard. They may claim to be working for the greater good but it’s more likely they are interested only in lining their own pockets.

If someone in a position of authority says something today that does not ring true you must confront them about it. Avoid being openly confrontational but make sure they give you a straight answer and make sure that answer makes sense.

The more time you spend with a loved one who seems a bit depressed the more you will come to understand what is making them so miserable. It may be that a little sympathy from you is all they need to start loving life again.

Someone on the work front seems to be stirring things up a bit and you need to make sure that their mischief-making can’t harm you. How will you know when they are lying to you? It happens every time they open their mouth!

As one of the zodiac’s “fixed” signs you don’t often change your views and you are not about to change them now just so a friend can feel better about themselves. If they don’t like what you have to say then clearly they need to shape up.

A clash of egos is likely this weekend and the planets warn that both sides have more to lose than to gain. It could be one of those situations that is filled with sound and fury but which ends up achieving nothing of any worth.

Saturn’s influence on your birthday could make you a bit too cautious for your own good. By all means weigh up the pros and cons of what you are planning but once the balance favours one side or the other you must take immediate action.

You don’t have to pretend that you agree with someone when, in fact, you know what they say is the opposite of the truth. Speak up and show them how they managed to get their arguments so muddled up. They probably won’t thank you for it though.

Cosmic activity in the friendship area of your chart means if you ask someone to do you a favour they will do so without hesitation and without any expectation of something in return. It’s days like this that make you proud to be human.

The fact that a partner or colleague has been so difficult to get along with in recent weeks must not be allowed to stop you from pushing ahead with any joint plans you may have. Your goals and their goals are still very much in alignment.

There is no point kicking yourself mentally for getting something wrong. So long as you learned from the experience you will actually be stronger for it in the weeks and months to come. You certainly won’t get it wrong next time.

Jupiter in your sign has added some much-needed self-belief to your outlook on life but the challenges you will face today and over the weekend could get you worrying again. The answer to your secret question is: Yes, you are up to the job!

Put your own interests first today and don’t be swayed by those who say you are the only one who can help them. Most likely they could easily help themselves if they decided to get their act together but they see you as an easy touch.

The planets suggest there is something you have either overlooked or deliberately ignored and you must get to grips with it right now. If you head into the weekend with the matter still unresolved it’s sure to make life harder than it needs to be.

Jupiter’s influence on your birthday will encourage you to believe in yourself and go after a goal that others say cannot be reached. That may be true for them but it isn’t true for you, so give yourself permission to dream – then go for it.

It may come as a shock if someone you consider an ally sides with a rival this weekend but it’s not the end of the world nor is it the end of your friendship. It is, however, a wake-up call. The support you expect has to be earned.

You know that what you are about to say will stir things up but the extent of the backlash may surprise you. It could be that you have been controversial for the sake of it once too often and others are fed-up with it.

You may not be entirely happy about what a loved one is proposing but you must support them anyway. Save any criticisms you have until after they have made their move. That way, if their efforts succeed you won’t look silly.

Your confidence may be high at the moment but don’t get carried away and start believing that you can do the impossible. No matter how sure you are of your ground, upcoming changes at home and at work could turn your world upside-down.

Criticism you get from people you work or do business with over the next 48 hours is designed to undermine your confidence in what you are doing. The cosmic omens are so good for you now that you can safely ignore everything they say.

The fact that someone you have not been on the best of terms with recently now seems so friendly is not a cause for concern. Yes, of course, it would be wise to check what they say but the planets indicate they are not being deceptive.

The message of the stars this weekend is that you must pursue what interests you, not what interests other people. That applies as much to family and social events as it does to your work – you don’t have to join in if you don’t want to.

Anyone who tries to sell you a hard-luck story this weekend must be treated with the utmost caution. Whatever their problem may be they most likely brought it on themselves, so see to it that they face the consequences of their actions.

Someone you meet on your travels this weekend will have a profound effect on the way you look at the world by pointing out facts that you were previously unaware of. It may be an unsettling experience but your mind is due for a change.

If you feel the need to get away from your usual surroundings then pack a bag and go. Your birthday chart indicates that you will do best this year when you act on impulse, so listen to what your inner voice is telling you and make that move.

What is going on behind the scenes is of much more importance now than what you can see going on right in front of you, so do some digging and ask questions about what other people’s true motives might be. The answers will surprise you.

There is no point getting worked up about a family situation that you have no way of changing. Just make sure you are on hand to give advice to loved ones when they ask you what they should do. Your input could be invaluable.

The sooner you let others know you won’t be pushed around the better. On the work front, especially, the moment a colleague gets a bit too assertive you must be assertive right back at them. Make it clear you always give as good as you get.

You may need to remind a friend or even a loved one of their obligations today. If they choose to make light of other people’s difficulties just remind them that they have been in similar situations too. It’s their responsibility to help.

Mercury, your ruler, joins forces with energy planet Mars today, so you will have plenty to say for yourself and you won’t be shy about saying it loud. The fact that you are usually such a reserved individual will give your words extra power.

You must not allow a lack of ready cash to hold you back from following your dreams. The fact that you have to find ways to be creative without spending too much money will make your success, when it comes, all the more satisfying.

Mars and Mercury combine energies in your sign today, so your vision of what needs to be done will be crystal clear and your ability to act swiftly and decisively will move you ahead of your rivals in leaps and bounds. It’s a good time to be you.

Yours may be one of the more positive signs of the zodiac but you go through periods of doubt like everyone else. If you find your mood dipping fast today you must do whatever it takes to lift yourself out of it. Life is meant to be enjoyed.

You may have your doubts that someone you work with has your interests at heart but keep your suspicions to yourself for the time being. If they continue to believe that you are unaware of their scheming it will make it easier to protect yourself.

Get out and about as the new week begins and interact with people from all walks of life. What you will discover is that almost everyone has the same dreams as you and that if you help each other then everyone can be a winner.

Don’t wait for the good things in life to come to you this year, take immediate action so you attract to yourself what it is you most desire. If you believe that the universe wants you to succeed then it is really just a matter of time.

Like it or not you will have to put other people’s needs ahead of your own today. The good news is that by doing so you will find yourself favored by someone whose power and influence could be of use to you later on.

You may be tempted to stray from the straight and narrow today but if you do you must make sure you know where you are going and what you are doing. If you get it wrong your rivals won’t waste any time in talking you down.

A new moon in the most dynamic area of your chart will do wonders for your confidence but it might be wise not to commit yourself to any grand new projects, at least until later in the week. Deal with what is in front of you first.

If your plans have to change to accommodate the needs of loved ones today it’s really no big deal. In fact, by the time the evening hours arrive you may be glad you were forced to change tack. Is the path you are on really so great?

Let your hair down and have some fun today. Cosmic activity in the most sociable area of your chart means that even a minute spent on your own is a minute wasted, so get out there and put on a typically larger-than-life show.

Your current crisis of confidence will pass not long after the sun changes signs on Thursday, so don’t worry yourself silly that you should be doing more right this very moment. There is a time for everything under the sun and your time will come.

Today’s new moon in your sign makes this the perfect time to do something different, something that marks you out from the crowd. Don’t worry that your behavior might be outrageous as that’s the sort of performance your audience wants to see.

You will have a great deal to think about today, so don’t commit yourself to activities that could take up too much of your time. Withdraw from the daily hustle and bustle and give yourself permission to ponder the big questions of life.

Forget about work and other commitments and get together with people who share your optimistic outlook. You may have felt a bit down yesterday but today you will bounce back and show those who doubt you just how resilient you can be.

The opportunity you have been waiting for to show people in positions of authority that you have what it takes to compete at the highest level will arrive very soon, so stay alert and be ready to take forceful action at a moment’s notice.

Give your body, your mind and also your heart permission to roam and don’t worry where you might end up because it is sure to be wonderful. Stop thinking about taking a vacation and buy your ticket today. Impulse travel is under excellent stars.

Something you do in secret will bring remarkable results before the end of the year. The less other people know about it for now the better, so focus on your dream and believe every moment of every day that it WILL come true.

Neptune, planet of deception moves back into the most sensitive area of your chart today but nothing bad will come of it so long as you refuse to fear the worst even when everyone else is running around in a panic. It’s life, so deal with it.

Do you walk toward a conflict of some sort or do you walk away from it? Only you can decide but as the sun is about to move into your opposite sign it will pay you to stay on good terms with everyone, if that is possible.

Cosmic activity in the career area of your chart will force you to confront your weaknesses on the work front. Don’t look at people who are better than you and think you can never compete with them – use their success to inspire you instead.

Your confidence will receive a massive boost when the sun joins Mars in the most dynamic area of your chart tomorrow, but don’t let your ego get out of control. You may be good but you are not yet the best – you still have some work to do.

Neptune’s move back into the wealth area of your chart means you will need to take extra care when dealing with business matters and anything related to property and possessions. This is most definitely not a good time to take risks.

What occurs over the next few days will make it clear that your recent fears were completely unfounded. The opportunities now coming your way will more than make up for any minor losses you may have sustained, so it’s really all good.

There may be things about your lifestyle you would like to change but the message of the stars now is that you must focus on making the best of your current situation. A major overhaul may be possible later on but for now you must be practical.

What you did yesterday, the day before or even six months ago is no longer of any relevance – the only thing that matters is what you do next. There is no limit to what you can achieve if you put your mind to it, so get serious about life.

Don’t worry if you find it hard to connect with people you love today. Neptune’s move into the family area of your chart means everyone is a little bit unsure of themselves at the moment. It’s not that you personally have done anything wrong.

You may be tempted to rub a rival up the wrong way, merely for the fun of it, but it could rebound on you later on when the positions are reversed and you are the one who is vulnerable to criticism. Keep your caustic remarks to yourself.

The sun’s imminent move into the career area of your chart makes it essential that you take a hard look at your work situation. Are you on the right path? Are you making the most of your many talents? It may be time for a change.

Both the sun and Neptune, your ruler, move in your favour over the next 48 hours but as Neptune is moving retrograde any gains you make now may not be long-lasting. If you are planning to travel don’t leave the details to chance.

You may be reluctant to take advantage of an opportunity on the work front as it does not seem to fit in with your long-term plans, but your birthday chart indicates you need to take each day as it comes rather than look too far ahead.

An opportunity to make some serious money could come your way before the start of next week, so stay alert and be ready to act if you see a financial opening that other people appear to have missed. The universe wants you to be rich.

You have worked so hard and achieved so much in recent weeks that you could probably do with a rest. So take it. No one is putting pressure on you to get things finished, so why put pressure on yourself? Treat yourself gently.

If you are smart you will find a way to spend time with your nearest and dearest between now and the weekend. No matter how heavy your workload may be there are ways you can make a bit more space for yourself and the people you love.

If there is something you hoped would be finished by now you may have to accept that it isn’t going to get done any time soon and drop it from your wish list. Also, make sure what you are working on pays off financially. Time is money after all.

The sun joins Mars and Mercury in your sign today, so your instincts will be super sharp and you will see in a moment what needs to be done while others remain completely confused about what’s going on. You are way ahead of your rivals.

You don’t often look back and wonder what might have been but cosmic activity in the most sensitive area of your chart makes that essential. Aim to make what you did yesterday the foundation stone of all the great things you will be doing tomorrow.

If you feel inclined to break a few rules and cut a corner or two today then go for it and don’t worry what the consequences might be. Others will be so amazed by your lack of caution that they stand back and let you get on with it.

The sun enters the career area of your chart today, so forget about personal issues for a while and devote yourself fully to getting ahead in the world. Don’t pretend that you are not that ambitious – you want to make your mark like everyone else.

Almost every cosmic indicator is working in your favour now, so be ruthless with yourself and banish any doubts you may have about where you are going and what you are doing. The path you are on is exactly the right one for you.

You will be motivated to achieve something out of the ordinary over the coming year. There will be this deep inner feeling that you were born to be a catalyst for change and that the time to start bringing about that change is now.

The events of the next 24 hours will test your patience to the full. Some people seem to delight in keeping you waiting and like it or not you won’t be going anywhere without their permission. All you can do is try to stay calm.

You may be tempted to rush what you are working on but the planets warn that could trigger a series of small mistakes that will quickly add up to a large one. Take your time and get it right, even if you are starting to get bored.

With both the sun and Mercury moving through the work area of your chart your chores are sure to pile up. No matter how minor the tasks you are expected to deal with you must take them seriously. Never give less than 100 per cent.

You now have the green light to press ahead with a creative activity that has been a bit stop-start in recent weeks. Focus on it to the exclusion of everything else and refuse to be satisfied with anything less than perfection. Make it your masterpiece.

Do you think more with your head or your heart? As the sun occupies one of the more emotional areas of your chart you could forget about reason and logic altogether this weekend and let your feelings guide you. Hopefully they won’t mislead you too.

You will have lots to say for yourself this weekend. Make sure that every last word makes sense to those you interact with both at home and at work. If you have to say something harsh try to soften it with kind words as well.

There is no point taking what happens this weekend too seriously because it will be overtaken by events come Monday morning. Don’t worry too much about your financial situation either, as opportunities to make money will come your way soon.

Now the sun is in your sign you are no doubt eager to start something new but before you rush ahead make sure you have a realistic plan. And make sure you have a back-up plan too, just in case the first one doesn’t work after all.

If you keep a low profile over the next 48 hours it will be easier to get important things done early next week. The less other people know about what you are up to the better, because if they do know they are sure to complain.

You don’t make friends easily but when you do get close to someone you trust them completely. Someone you meet on your travels this weekend will inspire you to get more involved in the wider world, and that’s a very good thing.

The best way to make an impression on employers and people in positions of authority is to let them see that nothing fazes you. No matter what obstacles you may face this weekend you can and you must stay calm at all times.

The more a colleague or business partner talks this weekend the more you will suspect that their words are designed to cover up their failings. Insist that they come clean with you. Can they deliver on their promises or not?

A Mercury-Saturn link on your birthday will help you focus on what is important. You don’t have so much time to spare that you can afford to waste it on trivialities, so aim for something big this year and don’t stop until you’ve reached it.

It won’t be easy to see that your glass is half full rather than half empty today but you must make that effort if you want the week ahead to be a good one. Count your blessings one by one and then make a point of enjoying them.

If someone you work or do business with picks holes in your performance today you must let them know in no uncertain terms that if they don’t like what you are doing you will happily take your skills elsewhere. Watch how quickly they change their tune!

Jupiter in your sign links perfectly with energy planet Mars today, so even the smallest of efforts on your part will yield amazing results. Decide what your No. 1 priority in life is going to be and go after it with everything you’ve got.

Focus your energy in a single direction and let everyone know that you are now operating on a level that most people cannot even dream of reaching. With Mars in your sign linked to Jupiter, planet of good fortune, the world is yours for the taking.

You may have good reason to be angry with someone who has let you down but is it worth your time and effort hitting back at them? No it is not. Just ignore them for now and decide later on whether or not you will trust them again.

Jupiter and Mars join forces across the most dynamic and adventurous areas of your chart today, so get out into the world and impose your personality on current events. Others will find your passion for what you believe in hugely attractive.

There is no point trying to change a situation that has almost worked itself out. If you are smart you will put it behind you and move on to the next big challenge. Just because you have lost a battle doesn’t mean you will lose the war.

The more a colleague tells everyone what a wonderful human being you are today the more suspicious you will become. It could be the reason they are bigging you up is because they think they will benefit from being your closest associate.

Something you found hard to master yesterday will come easy to you today. Sometimes the simple act of leaving things alone for 24 hours can be enough to clear away obstacles, in particular the ones that exist mainly in your mind.

If you stick to the path you have chosen and refuse to be knocked off course by those who say you are heading for disaster then what happens today will bring the broadest of smiles to your face. That “disaster” will in fact be a triumph.

With the sun and Mars on your side at the moment even the smallest of efforts will yield big results. With that fact in mind today push yourself a little bit harder, but not so hard that your muscles ache or you get out of breath.

You may be tempted to splash out on a luxury item or two this weekend, or maybe head off for an unplanned vacation, but can you afford it? Maybe not, but what’s a few bucks if the end result is you feel so much happier about life?

The fact that you could not care less what other people think about you is all very well, but if you come across as arrogant or aloof it could harm both your personal and professional prospects. What happened to all that lovely Leo warmth!

If you are on the move over the next 48 hours you would be wise to plan ahead and give yourself some extra time to reach your destination. Unexpected hold-ups are guaranteed, so keep your schedule as flexible as possible.

Don’t let differences over finances drive a wedge between you and someone you love. It’s no big deal agreeing to pay out a bit more than you had expected to. You could even gain something good that no amount of money can buy.

If friends and family members want to do things for you this weekend, and they will, then let them. You may prefer to tackle certain tasks on your own but if you allow others to help you it will make them happy and earn you lots of goodwill.

You must stay alert over the next 48 hours, because there is information doing the rounds that could be useful to you. Don’t merely listen to what friends and colleagues tell you – try to work out the real meaning behind the words.

You may not be enthusiastic about what you are expected to do this weekend but if you knuckle down and get it done on time and to a high standard you will do your reputation no harm at all. The powers that be are watching you closely.

You might want to be a bit more secretive about your financial affairs. As the full moon approaches there is a danger you could let slip information that will profit other people more than it profits you, so keep what you know to yourself.

If you take the time and make the effort to explain your position to family and friends today they won’t be so inclined to think you are keeping things from them. You don’t have anything to hide, so shed some light on the situation.

There must be an easier way to deal with your exhausting workload, so give it some thought between now and Wednesday’s full moon. It would help, of course, if you stopped trying to do it all on your own. Colleagues will help if you ask them to.

You may have to put something you have been labouring over on hold for a while. According to the planets the more effort you put into it over the next two or three days the less you will get out of it, so call a temporary halt.

You can be a bit gullible at times, believing what you want to believe rather than seeing the truth that is right in front of you, and the upcoming full moon could make that tendency worse. Deal only in facts and don’t listen to rumours.

A money matter of some kind will come to a head over the next few days and while it might be a touch painful as far as your cashflow is concerned it will also make it easier to plan for the future. Savings need to be made.

The sun in your sign means the universe is still on your side but other influences warn you must not take relationships for granted. Is there someone you love who needs your attention? Put your own plans on hold and give it to them.

Something that once had an emotional hold over you no longer has the power to limit what you do in life, so break free of any and all restraints and show the world what you are capable of – much more than you have been doing of late.

Your confidence may be high at the moment but you need to be aware that your success, or your failure, is still very much in the hands of other people. Always make sure that partners and colleagues are aware of your plans.

As Mars moves into your opposite sign tomorrow it’s unlikely you will get your own way either at home or at work. Once you accept that fact you can adjust your tactics and find ways to work round whatever obstacles are placed in your path.

You need to start looking at life from a broader perspective. Too often in the past you have limited yourself to a narrow viewpoint of what does and does not matter and that has restricted your options. Act as if there are no limits.

It may annoy you that someone you thought was strong-minded like you seems overly sensitive to even quite minor setbacks, but that’s just the way it is. At least you will know better than to trust them with assignments that might be stressful.

Mars is about to join your ruling planet Mercury in one of the more emotional areas of your chart, so your priority must be to stay calm when confronted by situations that rub you up the wrong way. Try to see the funny side of petty annoyances.

There can be no more excuses for not pushing ahead with your plans. The time has come to commit yourself 100 per cent and the first step must be to cut out of your life anything and everything that might distract you. Be ruthless with yourself.

You have been extremely lucky of late but not everyone has been so blessed. If a friend or loved one is struggling and in need of assistance make it your business to help them. Give back some of your good fortune to the world.

As Mars is about to move into your birth sign both your energy and your self-belief will soar. That may be a recipe for success but don’t push your luck too far and do things that people in positions of power are unlikely to approve of.

You need to focus less on the material side of life and more on what makes you happy emotionally. No matter how successful you may be in the world at large it is still human relationships that make it a joy to be alive.

The approaching full moon will make you rather emotional and if you let your feelings run away with you over the next few days you could regret it. There are very few things in life that are genuinely worth getting worked up about.

With Mars and Uranus highlighted on your birthday you will be dynamic in the extreme, but there is also a danger you will take the kind of risks that even a Scorpio should avoid. Try to find a sensible midpoint, maybe somewhere between adventurous and reckless!

Your attitude toward material things will change radically under the influence of the full moon. Money will still be important, of course, but now you can see it is merely a means to an end. It’s what you do with what you earn that counts.

A way of looking at the world that has worked for you in the past is now beyond its sell-by date and what happens over the next 24 hours will convince you it is time to leave it behind. There are better ways of understanding reality.

You are who you are for a reason and no one has the right to insist that you change. That won’t stop them trying, of course, but you won’t be listening to people who clearly care more about their own desires than they do about yours.

All things change over time and what the universe is changing in your life right now is exactly what you need, so don’t fight it. Why be so fixed in your outlook that you refuse to admit there may be a better way of doing things?

Although today’s full moon cuts across positive areas of your chart it will still bring challenges, one of which could see you disagreeing with people you usually get along with. If you look for compromise solutions you will find them.

Today’s full moon is likely to take away something that you consider to be valuable but if you stand back from what’s going on and look at the situation with a critical eye you will realize that it’s really no great loss, so let it go.

A full moon in your opposite sign means you will have to deal with someone whose feelings are out of control. Probably the best thing you can do to assist them is to stay out of their way and allow the emotional storm to blow itself out.

It may annoy you that a loved one’s behaviour means you have to stand back from what you are working on and sort out their problems for them but do it anyway. They have been there for you in the past, so now be there for them.

Because today’s full moon cuts across the home and career areas of your chart it may feel as if you have to prioritize one over the other, but that isn’t true. There are more than enough hours in the day to get everything done, IF you plan ahead.

You may be tempted to let certain people know what you think of them but if what you think of them is negative perhaps you should think again. You don’t HAVE to point out their faults and failings – you could just as easily ignore them.

You don’t have to make any great promises or long-term resolutions on your birthday, in fact it would be better if you did not. Take each day as it comes and aim to make that day on its own the best day ever – 365 times over.

With your ruler Mars linked to passion planet Pluto today there will be some very strong feelings doing the rounds. The good news is you should have no trouble keeping your own feelings under control, which is more than can be said for some!

Your need to express yourself will be strong between now and the weekend but you must make sure that what you say does not come across to friends and loved ones as unduly harsh. Be truthful but try to be tactful as well.

The more someone says you can trust them the more you will need to keep tabs on their actions. They may not be deliberately trying to mislead you but there is a chance they have been mislead themselves and what they say could be completely wrong.

Your way with words means you can usually bend people to your will but the planets warn that may not be possible now where money matters are concerned. If you owe someone a bit of cash there can be no excuses – you must pay up.

Venus, planet of emotional and material values, joins the sun in your sign today and almost immediately your outlook on life, and you attitude toward certain people, won’t be so harsh. Smile more, love more and accept that what will be will be.

If you use your imagination over the next 24 hours you will come up with a really great idea, the sort of idea that will impress people in positions of power and improve your chances of long-term success. Above all, you must trust your instincts.

Although you sometimes find it hard to express yourself that won’t be so much of a problem today. But choose your words carefully because communications planet Mercury begins its retrograde phase at the weekend. Only say what you truly mean.

Focus your mental energy in a single direction and don’t let up until the task you are working on has been completed. As one of the zodiac’s fixed signs you have more staying power than most – a cosmic super power that makes you a winner.

Love planet Venus moves into the most adventurous area of your chart today, so even if you are shy and sensitive by nature you will still find ways to send out signals of affection. Be careful though or you could attract some unwanted attention!

Family and financial matters will come to the fore over the next 12 months and you will have no choice but to deal with them personally. If you are both firm and fair others will respect your decisions and do what you ask of them.

With both Mercury and Mars, your ruler, moving in your favour at the moment your future is bright. However, as Mercury begins its next retrograde phase on Sunday you cannot afford to take anything for granted. Be adventurous but avoid being reckless.

Upheavals are more likely than not over the next few days as Uranus, planet of the unexpected, moves back into your sign. You won’t be able to plan too far ahead, so be ready to react to events as and when they occur.

If you feel the urge to start something new today then go for it and ignore those who say you are risking too much. Maybe they are right, but when you are in this sort of mood there’s not much that can hold you back.

It’s inevitable that you will experience some sort of backlash to what you have been up to of late but that won’t bother you in the slightest. Your outlook on life is so dynamic that you actually welcome challenges as a way of proving yourself.
